entries.cn_improved: 为何！为何不应！回答我，道策！！

entries.en: Dousakuuuuuuuuu!!
entries.jp: 道策うううううううううう！！

entries.en: Please answer me, master!
entries.jp: 答えてください、師匠！

entries.cn: 为何！为何不应！回答我，道策！！
entries.en: Why?! Why won't you answer me?! Answer me, Dousaku!!
entries.jp: なぜだっ！　なぜ応えないっ！　答えろ、道策っ！！
entries.cn_improved: 为何！为何不应！回答我，道策！！

entries.en: Answer me, Dousaku...
entries.jp: 答えろ、道策…

entries.cn: 吾师啊……为何……为何不回答……
entries.en: Master... Why... Why won't you answer me...?
entries.jp: 我が師よ…　なぜだ…　なぜ答えない…
entries.cn_improved: 吾师啊……为何……为何不回答……

entries.en: Dousaku... Dousaku... Dousaku...
entries.jp: 道策…　道策…　道策…

entries.en: That's right.
entries.jp: そうだ

entries.en: I thought as much.
entries.jp: やはり、そうですか

entries.cn: 你能承接……那项任务是吧
entries.en: Might you be willing to take on... a favor for me?
entries.jp: あの任を…　請け負っていただける、とか
entries.cn_improved: 你能承接……那项任务是吧

entries.cn:
我叫道顺
负责准备变若水的施术
entries.en:
I am Doujun.
I've been tasked with the preparation of a medical treatment using the rejuvenating waters.
entries.jp:
私は、道順
変若水の施術の支度を、任されております
entries.cn_improved:
我叫道顺
负责准备变若水的施术

entries.en: I'll get to the point, my dear Shinobi...
entries.jp: さっそくですが、忍びの御方…

entries.cn: 就把师父交给我的信拿给你吧
entries.en: This is a letter I received from the master.
entries.jp: 師匠から預かった文を、お渡ししましょう
entries.cn_improved: 就把师父交给我的信拿给你吧

entries.en: The particulars are contained within.
entries.jp: 仔細はこちらに

entries.en: My, you are a talkative one, aren't you?
entries.jp: 明かせぬのですね

entries.cn: 那么，互无瓜葛比较好吧
entries.en: In that case, I don't wish to waste any more of your time. Good day.
entries.jp: ならば、互いに関わらぬがよろしいでしょう
entries.cn_improved: 那么，互无瓜葛比较好吧

entries.en: Yes.
entries.jp: ああ

entries.en: Indeed... you have obtained it.
entries.jp: 確と…　お受け取りしました

entries.cn: 这么一来，施术又能更进一步
entries.en: With this, the treatment can be advanced.
entries.jp: これで、施術がまた一つ進む
entries.cn_improved: 这么一来，施术又能更进一步

entries.cn: 师父肯定……会开心得眉开眼笑吧
entries.en: I'm sure the master...will be ecstatic.
entries.jp: きっと、師匠は…　手放しで喜ぶでしょう
entries.cn_improved: 师父肯定……会开心得眉开眼笑吧

entries.en: ...even if, I am not.
entries.jp: …だが、私はどうだ

entries.cn: 我怎么也无法变成像师父那样的心态
entries.en: Try as I might, I'm unable to muster the same level of enthusiasm...
entries.jp: 師匠のような心持ちに、どうしてもなれぬ
entries.cn_improved: 我怎么也无法变成像师父那样的心态

entries.en: Doujun, you novice...
entries.jp: 道順、この未熟者め…

entries.cn:
啊……请别介意，忍者阁下
我定会完成使命
entries.en:
Ah... Fret not, dear shinobi.
I will perform my duty.
entries.jp:
ああ…　お気になさらず、忍びの御方
役目は、必ず果たします
entries.cn_improved:
啊……请别介意，忍者阁下
我定会完成使命

entries.en: For the glory of Ashina...
entries.jp: これも、葦名のためなのだ…

entries.cn:
忍者阁下，这是谢礼
还请收下
entries.en:
Your reward, dear shinobi.
Please accept it with our thanks.
entries.jp:
忍びの御方、謝礼です
こちらをお納めください
entries.cn_improved:
忍者阁下，这是谢礼
还请收下

entries.en: No...
entries.jp: いや…

entries.en: ...I see.
entries.jp: …そうですか

entries.cn: 啊……道顺，现在可不是该安心的时候啊……
entries.en: Ahh...forgive me. I must get back to work.
entries.jp: ああ…　安堵している場合か、道順…
entries.cn_improved: 啊……道顺，现在可不是该安心的时候啊……

entries.jp: ああっ！
ぐおっ！

entries.en: P-Please stop
entries.jp: や、やめてください

entries.en: What are you doing...?!
entries.jp: 何をするのです…！

entries.en: Why?!
entries.jp: なぜだ！

entries.cn: 你果然是厌恶我等的施术吗！
entries.en: So, you cannot abide our science?!
entries.jp: やはり、我らの施術を厭うというのか！
entries.cn_improved: 你果然是厌恶我等的施术吗！

entries.en: Hehehe...
entries.jp: ふふふ…

entries.en: Master, I've done as you've asked.
entries.jp: 師匠、やりましたよ

entries.en: Ahhhhhh...!
entries.jp: あああっ……！

entries.en: Ahh...
entries.jp: ああ…

entries.en: Master... Please, help me...
entries.jp: 師匠…　助けて、ください…

entries.en: I've done it...
entries.jp: やりましたよ…

entries.cn: 按师父说的做，就没问题……
entries.en: Everything will be fine as long as I obey master...
entries.jp: 師匠の言うとおりにすれば、大丈夫だ…
entries.cn_improved: 按师父说的做，就没问题……

entries.en: Gwahhh...!
entries.jp: ぐおおおっ……！

entries.en: Ahh... I am sorry.
entries.jp: ああ…　済みませぬ

entries.en: Master... I've failed you...
entries.jp: 師匠…　しくじってしまいました…

entries.en: Master!
entries.jp: 師匠！

entries.en: I, Doujun, have finally succeeded!
entries.jp: 道順は、ついに成しましたぁっ！

entries.en: How dare you...!
entries.jp: 何ということを…！

entries.en: How dare you interrupt the procedure!!
entries.jp: よくも…　施術の妨げをっ！

entries.en: Damn you... Dousakuuuu...
entries.jp: おのれ…　道策うぅ…

entries.en: Are you better now...?
entries.jp: 治ったか…

entries.cn: 连道玄大人都束手无策的病……
entries.en: Not even Lord Dougen was able to succesfully cure the Dragonrot...
entries.jp: あの道玄様ですら、治せなかったものを…
entries.cn_improved: 连道玄大人都束手无策的病……

entries.en: Emma... You've always been so talented...
entries.jp: エマ…　いつも、お前はそうだ…

entries.en: ... You know her?
entries.jp: …知っているのか

entries.en: It's... not any business of yours...
entries.jp: 貴方には…　関わりのないことです…

entries.en: Dosaku...
entries.jp: ぐふぅ…　道策…

entries.cn: 你打算就这样……戏弄人吗……
entries.en: So this... this is how you toy with me...
entries.jp: そうやって…　弄ぶつもりかぁ…
entries.cn_improved: 你打算就这样……戏弄人吗……

entries.cn: 下回你又要搞什么，道策……
entries.en: What do you have planned next, Dosaku...?
entries.jp: 次は、何をする気だ、道策…
entries.cn_improved: 下回你又要搞什么，道策……

entries.en: (Wheezing with cough)
(Wheezing)
(wheezing and coughing up blood)
I'm taking a blood sample.
entries.jp: 血をもらうぞ

entries.en: (Wheeze... Wheeze... Cough, cough.)
entries.jp: ゼヒ…ゼヒ…ゴホッゴホッ

entries.en: ... Now to bring this to Lady Emma.
entries.jp: …これを、エマ殿に

entries.en: Take this... It's medicine.
entries.jp: これを…。薬だ

entries.en: Medicine...?
entries.jp: ゼヒ…　ふふ…　薬…？

entries.en: My dear shinobi...
entries.jp: 忍びの御方…

entries.en: I'm not... that foolish...
entries.jp: ゼヒ…　私は…　それほど、愚かではありません…

entries.cn: 那来历不明的药……你说是什么……
entries.en: What did you say... this bizarre concoction was for...?
entries.jp: 何だというのです…　その得体の知れぬ薬は…
entries.cn_improved: 那来历不明的药……你说是什么……

entries.en: Here...
entries.jp: これを…

entries.en: Dosakuuu...
entries.jp: ゼヒ、ゼヒ、ゼヒ、道策ぅ…

entries.en: Forgive me...
entries.jp: 済まぬが…

entries.en: (gulps)
entries.jp: むごっ…　ゴクリ…

entries.en: Urh... Urrggghhh!
entries.jp: う…　うわあっ！

entries.cn: 道策！混帐！你给我喝了什么！
entries.en: Dousaku! Damn you! What did you make me drink?!
entries.jp: 道策！　おのれっ！　何を、飲ませたあ！
entries.cn_improved: 道策！混帐！你给我喝了什么！

entries.en: It's medicine for the Dragonrot...
entries.jp: これは、竜咳の薬…

entries.cn: 是叫做爱麻的药师做的
entries.en: A doctor named Emma made it
entries.jp: エマという、薬師がつくったものだ
entries.cn_improved: 是叫做爱麻的药师做的

entries.en: Emma...!
entries.jp: エマ…！

entries.en: She's but a child...! How ridiculous...
entries.jp: ゼヒ…　あの娘が…！　馬鹿な…

entries.en: ... Will you drink it?
entries.jp: …飲んでくれるか

entries.en: I suppose I could... try it.
entries.jp: 試すくらいは…。良いでしょう

entries.en: (gulps)
entries.jp: ゴクリ…

entries.en: (wheezing)
entries.jp: ぜえ…ぜえ…ぜえ…

entries.en: My breathing... it... it's...
entries.jp: 息が…　なん…だと…

entries.en: How is it?
entries.jp: どうだ？

entries.en: Be silent... I must track my progress...
entries.jp: お静かに…。経過を、見ねば…

entries.en: As... as I thought...
entries.jp: ゼヒ…　やは…り…

entries.en: I won't... be fooled...
entries.jp: 騙され…ませんよ…

entries.en: Damn you...
entries.jp: ゼヒ…ゼヒ…　おのれ…

entries.cn: 这可恨的咳嗽……妨碍我……施术……
entries.en: This blasted Dragonrot... Interfering... with our treatment...
entries.jp: 忌々しい咳め…　施術の…邪魔を…
entries.cn_improved: 这可恨的咳嗽……妨碍我……施术……

entries.en: Dosakuuu...
entries.jp: ゼヒ…ゼヒ…　道策ぅ…

entries.cn: 【说明尚未能见稚儿】【授予忍杀忍术（傀儡）】
entries.en:
greeting_1st time: explaining why the Temple boss is not available
"You can't fight the boss. Let me teach you the Puppeteer Technique."
entries.jp: 「まだ稚児には会えない事を説明」「忍殺忍術（傀儡）を渡す」

entries.en: Greeting_1st time: explaining why the Temple boss is not available_reminder
entries.jp: 「まだ稚児には会えない事を説明」リマインド

entries.cn: 噢噢……原谅我吧，变若的御子们啊……
entries.en: Children of the Rejuvenating Waters... forgive me!
entries.jp: オオォ…　許しておくれ、変若の御子たちよ…
entries.cn_improved: 噢噢……原谅我吧，变若的御子们啊……

entries.en: That child... she's the only one left...
entries.jp: 残ったのは…　あの子だけ…

entries.cn: 很寂寞吧……独自幽居，很寂寞吧……
entries.en: She must be lonely... Trapped in that room by herself... she must be so lonely...
entries.jp: 寂しかろ…　独り籠って、寂しかろ…
entries.cn_improved: 很寂寞吧……独自幽居，很寂寞吧……

entries.en: ...Hm? You there, who are you...?
entries.jp: …んう？　お主は誰じゃ…

entries.en: What business do you have with Senpou Temple?
entries.jp: この仙峯寺に、何をしに参った

entries.en: Is there...something else?
entries.jp: お主…　まだ、何かあるのか？

entries.cn:
如今这座寺院……
已经不是正常人可以待的地方了
entries.en:
This temple...
it's no longer a place where decent people should be.
entries.jp:
今のこの寺には…
もう、まともな人がいるべきではない
entries.cn_improved:
如今这座寺院……
已经不是正常人可以待的地方了

entries.jp: …んう？

entries.en: That smell...
entries.jp: スンスン…　ああぁ…　その匂い…

entries.cn: 你是龙胤御子的侍从吗
entries.en: So you're the one who works for the Divine Heir of the Dragon's Blood.
entries.jp: そなた、竜胤の御子に、仕える者じゃったのか
entries.cn_improved: 你是龙胤御子的侍从吗

entries.en: That's right.
entries.jp: そうだ

entries.en: The Divine Heir is truly exalted...
entries.jp: 御子は、貴い…

entries.cn: 但是，即便再尊贵……也是人……
entries.en: But exalted or not... man is still man...
entries.jp: じゃが、貴き者とて…　人は人…
entries.cn_improved: 但是，即便再尊贵……也是人……

entries.cn: 噢噢……我真是愚蠢……竟没想到这点……
entries.en: Ohhh... I'm so foolish that... I didn't understand that myself...
entries.jp: オォォ…　愚かな儂は…　それが分からなんだ…
entries.cn_improved: 噢噢……我真是愚蠢……竟没想到这点……

entries.cn: 你……你不能让你的御子独自一人
entries.en: Don't... Don't leave your Divine Heir on his own.
entries.jp: そなたは…　そなたの御子を、独りにするでない
entries.cn_improved: 你……你不能让你的御子独自一人

entries.cn: 快去……等失去再后悔就迟了……
entries.en: Leave... It's too late to regret once you've already lost them...
entries.jp: 行きなされ…　失ってから悔いるのでは、遅いのじゃ…
entries.cn_improved: 快去……等失去再后悔就迟了……

entries.en: Make your way to Ashina Castle.
entries.jp: 葦名の城へ、向かうのじゃ

entries.en: Hello?
entries.jp: おい

entries.cn: 我听说有尊贵的人在此
entries.en: I'm told that a special holy person lives here.
entries.jp: 貴い御方が、いると聞いた
entries.cn_improved: 我听说有尊贵的人在此

entries.cn: 尊贵的人……是说那个孩子吧
entries.en: Remarkably holy... That would be the child, I imagine.
entries.jp: 貴い御方…　あの子のことじゃな
entries.cn_improved: 尊贵的人……是说那个孩子吧

entries.en: She's not here anymore.

entries.cn: 是我的错……那孩子闭居到内殿了
entries.en: It's my fault... The child, she's confined within the Inner Sanctum.

entries.cn_improved: 是我的错……那孩子闭居到内殿了

entries.en: I see.
entries.jp: そうか

entries.en: Are you... a shinobi?
entries.jp: お主は…　忍びか？

entries.en: Hmm... If that's the case, then actually...
entries.jp: ふうむ…　ならば、あるいは…

entries.en: I have a favor to ask of you.
entries.jp: お主に、一つ頼みがある

entries.cn: 那个孩子一直想知道……自己宿命的缘由
entries.en: The child wanted to know... the reason for her fate.
entries.jp: あの子は、知りたがっておった…　己の定めの由縁を
entries.cn_improved: 那个孩子一直想知道……自己宿命的缘由

entries.cn: 如果你能见到，请帮我转交这个……
entries.en: If you do see her by some chance, please give her this...
entries.jp: もし、会えたならば、これを渡してやってくれ…
entries.cn_improved: 如果你能见到，请帮我转交这个……

entries.en: It's the least I can do for my own atonement...

entries.en: All right.
entries.jp: 分かった

entries.en: You have no answer?

entries.en: Then you should leave.

アァ…
オオォォ…

entries.cn: 得让那个孩子……回去才行……
entries.en: I must... return the child to her home...
entries.jp: あの子を…　帰してやらねば…
entries.cn_improved: 得让那个孩子……回去才行……

entries.en: She must be so lonely... so lonely...
entries.jp: 寂しかろ…　寂しかろ…

entries.en: You face... Genichiro Ashina...
entries.jp: 葦名弦一郎、参る…

entries.en: Prepare yourself!
entries.jp: 行くぞ…

entries.en: I ... will not be defeated... I cannot!

entries.en: I will restore Ashina to glory!

entries.en: Though I abandon my humanity...

entries.en: I will never yield this!
entries.jp: 譲れぬものがある！

entries.en: I will not allow Ashina to be crushed...!
entries.jp: 踏みにじらせは、せぬぞっ…！

entries.en: Yes, that's it.  Your strength...
entries.jp: ああ、そうだ。その力だ…

entries.en: Do what... must be done...

entries.cn_improved: 吾乃，鬼庭形部雅孝是也！

entries.cn: 哦，这样吗。实在是极好的事啊
entries.en: Oh, wonderful. Truly remarkable.
entries.jp: おお、左様か。まこと天晴なおのこよ
entries.cn_improved: 哦，这样吗。实在是极好的事啊

entries.en: Now, the secret I mentioned...
entries.jp: …して、秘めごとじゃが…

entries.cn: 请把这饵食献给主鲤大人
entries.en: I'd like you to present this bait to the Great Carp.
entries.jp: この餌を、ぬしの鯉様に献上しておくれ
entries.cn_improved: 请把这饵食献给主鲤大人

entries.cn: ……千万千万不要让任何人知道，要悄悄地哦……
entries.en: Don't let anyone see, if you can help it. Be as stealthy as possible.
entries.jp: …くれぐれも、誰にも知られず、ひそひそとな…
entries.cn_improved: ……千万千万不要让任何人知道，要悄悄地哦……

entries.cn: 那么一来，我就授予你秘宝哦……
entries.en: Do that, and I'll bestow upon you the palace's secret treasure.
entries.jp: さすればお主に、宮の秘宝を授けようぞ…
entries.cn_improved: 那么一来，我就授予你秘宝哦……

entries.en: Oh, do you doubt me?
entries.jp: おお、もしや我をお疑いかえ？

entries.en: Surely it's just a misunderstanding.
entries.jp: だが、それは誤解というもの

entries.cn: 因为是误会，所以能很快解开
entries.en: And misunderstandings can always be cleared up.
entries.jp: そして、誤解ゆえ、すぐにも解けるというものじゃ
entries.cn_improved: 因为是误会，所以能很快解开

entries.en: Come on. You understand me, right? Right?
entries.jp: …のう、お主なら分かるじゃろう…　のう？

entries.en: I see I've yet to clear up this misunderstanding.
entries.jp: おお、まだ誤解は解けておらぬかの

entries.cn: 不过你的话，很快就能解开的……是吧？
entries.en: But you could easily clear it up any time you like. Right?
entries.jp: だがお主なら、すぐにも解けるというものじゃ…　のう？
entries.cn_improved: 不过你的话，很快就能解开的……是吧？

entries.en: A well-bred man, you are.
entries.jp: 礼を知る、よきおのこじゃ

entries.en: Please bring more scales soon.
entries.jp: また鱗、持っておいでや…

entries.en: Bring me some scales next time...
entries.jp: 今度は、鱗持っておいでや…

entries.cn: 哎，我的饵食，就拜托你了呀
entries.en: Hello again. Take care with that bait.
entries.jp: のう、お主、我の餌を、よろしく頼むぞえ
entries.cn_improved: 哎，我的饵食，就拜托你了呀

entries.en: Quietly... Very, very quietly...
entries.jp: ひそひそと…　ひそひそとな…

entries.en: Hehe... hehehehehe...
entries.jp: ウフ、ウフフフフッ…

entries.en: Ohh, splendid, splendid...
entries.jp: おお、貴かろ…　貴かろ…

entries.en: Precious... Much more precious...
entries.jp: …貴く、もっと貴く…

entries.en: Give me more scales...
entries.jp: もっと鱗を…
ひっ！
ひいっ！

entries.en: I-It's going to break!
entries.jp: わ、割れる！

entries.en: Stop, you'll break the pot!
entries.jp: 壷が、割れてしまう！
ギャアアアアアッ！

entries.cn: ……我做了什么……什么罪过都没有……
entries.en: I did... nothing wrong... I'm innocent...
entries.jp: …我が、何を…　罪など、何も…
entries.cn_improved: ……我做了什么……什么罪过都没有……

entries.en: Please forgive me... my sins...
entries.jp: …ああ、我が罪、お許しください…
ぴっ…
ぴいっ…
ぴ、ぴいいいいっ…

entries.en: To kill one as precious as I...
entries.jp: …貴き我を、弑すとは…

entries.en: Have  you no shame...
entries.jp: 恥者めが…

entries.en: Hello... Hello...
entries.jp: のう…　のう…

entries.en: You there... Hello...
entries.jp: そこのお主…　のう…

entries.en: (Pained groans)
entries.jp: ぐ…　うぐうう…

entries.en: Please, try not to move.  It will make your wounds worse.
entries.jp: どうか、動かないでください…　傷に障ります

entries.en: No, I must go...
entries.jp: …いや、行かねばならぬ…

entries.cn: 贼人里面，混着猎忍的僧兵
entries.en: There is a shinobi hunter amongst the bandits.
entries.jp: 賊どものなかに、忍び狩りの僧兵が交ざっている
entries.cn_improved: 贼人里面，混着猎忍的僧兵

entries.cn: 那家伙武艺高超。无论如何我也得去……
entries.en: He's highly skilled.  If I don't face him...
entries.jp: あれは、手練れよ。どうしても、私が行かねば…
entries.cn_improved: 那家伙武艺高超。无论如何我也得去……

entries.en: (groans)
entries.jp: ぐ…　うぐうう…

entries.en: I forbid it!  You're in no condition...
entries.jp: ああっ…無理です…　この傷では、とても…

entries.en: Young man, please be careful.
entries.jp: お若いお人、お気をつけください

entries.cn: 宫里的贵族们正渴求年轻的精气
entries.en: The palace nobles have a craving for the vitality of youth.
entries.jp: 宮の貴族たちは、若い精気に渇いています
entries.cn_improved: 宫里的贵族们正渴求年轻的精气

entries.cn: 他们极其渴望吸取精气，想吸到不能自拔呢
entries.en: They can't help themselves. They want nothing but to sap away more and more of it.
entries.jp: 吸いたくて、吸いたくて、仕方がないのです
entries.cn_improved: 他们极其渴望吸取精气，想吸到不能自拔呢

entries.en: ... I see.
entries.jp: …ああ

entries.cn: 特别是这前面……中庭可是鬼门
entries.en: The courtyard ahead in particular... it is accursed.
entries.jp: 特に、この先…　中庭は鬼門です
entries.cn_improved: 特别是这前面……中庭可是鬼门

entries.en: It's crawling with palace nobles...
entries.jp: 宮の貴族が、わらわらと…

entries.cn: 想要前进的话，从外围绕过去比较好
entries.en: If you must forge ahead, you'd best go around it.
entries.jp: 先に進むなら、外周を回られた方がよろしいです
entries.cn_improved: 想要前进的话，从外围绕过去比较好

entries.en: Why are you telling me this?
entries.jp: なぜ、俺に？

entries.cn: 年轻人……有件事想拜托你……
entries.en: ... I have a favor to ask you, young man...
entries.jp: …お若いお人に、ひとつ頼みがございまして…
entries.cn_improved: 年轻人……有件事想拜托你……

entries.en: What is it?
entries.jp: 何だ

entries.en: It's about my father.
entries.jp: 父のことです

entries.cn:
我的父亲成为了贵族……
但那时，被鲤鱼蛊惑了
entries.en:
My father is now a noble... And the moment he became one
he found himself entranced by a carp, the Great Carp.
entries.jp:
我が父は、貴族になりましたが…
そのとき、鯉に魅入られてしまいました
entries.cn_improved:
我的父亲成为了贵族……
但那时，被鲤鱼蛊惑了

entries.cn: 他一直、一直在给鲤鱼喂食
entries.en: For a long, long time since, he's done nothing but feed that cursed carp.
entries.jp: もうずっと、ずっと、ただ鯉に餌をやっています
entries.cn_improved: 他一直、一直在给鲤鱼喂食

entries.cn: 年轻人，拜托你将父亲从鲤鱼的束缚中解放出来吧
entries.en: Young man. Please release my father from the carp's bewitching powers.
entries.jp: お若いお人。どうか父を、鯉の呪縛から解き放ってください
entries.cn_improved: 年轻人，拜托你将父亲从鲤鱼的束缚中解放出来吧

entries.cn: 那种永恒不是父亲所希望的……
entries.en: I know my father wouldn't wish for an eternity like that...
entries.jp: あのような永遠は、父の望みではありませんでした…
entries.cn_improved: 那种永恒不是父亲所希望的……

entries.cn:
中庭可是鬼门。想要前进的话
从外围绕过去比较好
entries.en:
The courtyard is an accursed place.  
If you must forge ahead, you'd best go around it.
entries.jp:
中庭は鬼門です。先に進むなら
外周を回られた方がよろしいです
entries.cn_improved:
中庭可是鬼门。想要前进的话
从外围绕过去比较好

entries.en: ... and if you see my father...
entries.jp: …そして、もし我が父に見えたなら

entries.cn: 拜托你，将他从鲤鱼的束缚中解放出来吧
entries.en: Please release him from the carp's bewitching powers.
entries.jp: どうか、鯉の呪縛から解き放ってあげてください
entries.cn_improved: 拜托你，将他从鲤鱼的束缚中解放出来吧

entries.en: He just feeds it, forever and ever.
entries.jp: ずっと、ずっと、ただ餌をやり続ける…

entries.cn: 那种永恒，不是父亲所希望的……
entries.en: My father would never have wished for such an eternity...
entries.jp: そんな永遠は、父の望みではありませんでした…
entries.cn_improved: 那种永恒，不是父亲所希望的……

entries.en: You've been through so much, father.
entries.jp: お疲れさまでした、父様

entries.cn:
即使没有什么永恒
我和姐姐也一直和您在一起哦……
entries.en: Though it may not be for eternity, my sister and I will always be with you...
entries.jp:
永遠などなくとも
私も、姉さまも、ずっと一緒ですよ…
entries.cn_improved:
即使没有什么永恒
我和姐姐也一直和您在一起哦……

entries.en: So please, father, rest now...
entries.jp: だから、休みましょう。父様…

entries.en: Excuse me, young man...
entries.jp: もし、お若いお人…

entries.en: Young man, excuse me...
entries.jp: お若いお人、もし…

entries.cn: 年轻人，你该不会是要去皇宫吧？
entries.en: Young man, do you happen to be going to the palace?
entries.jp: お若いお人、もしや、内裏に行かれるのですか？
entries.cn_improved: 年轻人，你该不会是要去皇宫吧？

entries.en: Yes.
entries.jp: ああ

entries.cn: 那样的话，走小路比较好
entries.en: If you are, you should take the back path.
entries.jp: それならば、脇道の方がよろしいです
entries.cn_improved: 那样的话，走小路比较好

entries.cn:
如今水中成了主鲤的卧榻
在水中巨大洞穴的前方
entries.en:
Nowadays it's under water, but there is a large cave you can take to get there.
Only, I hear the Great Carp now sleeps there...
entries.jp:
今は水の中、ぬしの鯉の寝床になっている
大きな洞窟の先でございます
entries.cn_improved:
如今水中成了主鲤的卧榻
在水中巨大洞穴的前方

entries.en: Why are you helping me..?
entries.jp: なぜ、そのような…？

entries.en: ...The gates to the palace have been closed for a long time now.
entries.jp: …内裏の扉は、もう永い間、閉じたままです

entries.cn:
我有很重要的事要办
但凭这老太婆的身体根本无计可施……
entries.en:
I have a very important task I must tend to,
but I couldn't possibly do it with this body of mine...
entries.jp:
大事な、お使いがあるのですが
この婆の身では、どうにも果たしようもなく…
entries.cn_improved:
我有很重要的事要办
但凭这老太婆的身体根本无计可施……

entries.cn: 所以希望年轻人你能帮我打开皇宫的大门……
entries.en: Might you open the door to the palace, young man...?
entries.jp: お若いお人に、内裏の扉を開けて頂ければと…
entries.cn_improved: 所以希望年轻人你能帮我打开皇宫的大门……

entries.cn:
如今水中成了主鲤的卧榻
水中巨大洞穴的前方就是去皇宫的小路
entries.en:
Nowadays it's under water, but there is a large cave that will take you to the palace.
Only, I hear the Great Carp now sleeps there...
entries.jp:
今は水の中、ぬしの鯉の寝床になっている
大きな洞窟の先が、内裏への脇道です
entries.cn_improved:
如今水中成了主鲤的卧榻
水中巨大洞穴的前方就是去皇宫的小路

entries.cn: ……然后，到了皇宫请从里面把门打开……
entries.en: ... and if you do enter the palace... I was hoping you could you open the gate for me...
entries.jp: …そして、内裏についたら、内より扉を開けて頂ければと…
entries.cn_improved: ……然后，到了皇宫请从里面把门打开……

entries.en: I have a task I must accomplish...
entries.jp: 大事なお使いがあるのです…

entries.en: You... you beasts!
entries.jp: この！このっ！

entries.en: You tricked him all this time!
entries.jp: よくも、よくも謀りおったな！

entries.en: "Nobility" this, and "Eternity" that, pretty lies to fool him!
entries.jp: なにが貴族なものか！永遠なものか！

entries.cn: 还给我！把父亲……把父亲还给我……
entries.en: Give him back!  Father... my father... give him back...
entries.jp: 返せ！父を…　 父様を、返せぇ…
entries.cn_improved: 还给我！把父亲……把父亲还给我……

entries.cn: 噫、噫噫、噫噫噫噫噫噫噫噫……
entries.en: (crying)
entries.jp: ヒッ、ヒイッ、ヒイイイイイイッ…
entries.cn_improved: 噫、噫噫、噫噫噫噫噫噫噫噫……

entries.en: Excuse me, young man...
entries.jp: もし、お若いお人…

entries.en: Young man, excuse me...
entries.jp: お若いお人、もし…

entries.en: Oh...? You survived?
entries.jp: へえ…　あんたが生き残ったのかい

entries.cn: 鬼形部大人，也终究成了尸骸吗
entries.en: That accursed Gyoubu's finally a corpse, I take it?
entries.jp: 鬼の形部様も、やっと屍になれたかね
entries.cn_improved: 鬼形部大人，也终究成了尸骸吗

entries.en: That changes nothing, you know.
entries.jp: けれど、何も変わりゃあしないよ

entries.cn: 战争持续，尸横遍野，怨声载道
entries.en: There'll be more wars, there'll be more corpses, and deep-seated hatred will run wild.
entries.jp: 戦は続き、屍は詰まれ、怨嗟ばかりが満ち満ちる
entries.cn_improved: 战争持续，尸横遍野，怨声载道

entries.cn:
……你曾想过吗？
这些怨嗟会堆积向何处
entries.en:
Where's all that hatred go?
Haven't you ever wondered?
entries.jp:
…あんた、考えたことがあるかい？
そういう怨嗟が、どこに積もっていくのかを
entries.cn_improved:
……你曾想过吗？
这些怨嗟会堆积向何处

entries.en: Guess not. Guess you haven't.
entries.jp: ないだろう、ないだろうねえ

entries.cn: 正因如此，你和那家伙都很可怜啊
entries.en: That's why I pity you, and I pitied him.
entries.jp: だからこそ、あんたも、あ奴も、憐れなことだよ
entries.cn_improved: 正因如此，你和那家伙都很可怜啊

entries.en: Now then, be gone already.
entries.jp: さあ、もうお行き

entries.cn: 我一个老太婆无论讲什么，战争也不会结束
entries.en: There's no end to war, no matter what this old hag says.
entries.jp: 婆が何を語ろうが、戦は無くならない
entries.cn_improved: 我一个老太婆无论讲什么，战争也不会结束

entries.en: Your duties will never change either.
entries.jp: あんたのお役目も、変わらない

entries.en: That's just how it is.
entries.jp: そういうものだよ

entries.en: You want something?
entries.jp: あんた、何用かね？

entries.en: If not, be gone.
entries.jp: 用がなければ、もうお行き

entries.cn: ……不久战争就会爆发。惨烈的战争……
entries.en: ...War is on the horizon. A dreadful one at that.
entries.jp: …もうすぐ、戦になる。惨い戦にね
entries.cn_improved: ……不久战争就会爆发。惨烈的战争……

entries.cn: 尸体将堆积如山，怨嗟如熊熊烈火卷起漩涡……
entries.en: The dead will rise as mountains, the hate will flow like an inferno...
entries.jp: 屍は山と詰まれ、怨嗟は大火のように渦を巻き…
entries.cn_improved: 尸体将堆积如山，怨嗟如熊熊烈火卷起漩涡……

entries.en: It will give birth to a demon, I'm certain of it.
entries.jp: きっと、鬼が生まれっちまうよ

entries.en: Now then, be gone already.
entries.jp: さあ、もうお行き

entries.en: I doubt you'd want to meet a demon, would you?
entries.jp: あんただって、鬼に会いたい訳じゃあなかろう？

entries.en: Oh...? You're still alive?
entries.jp: へえ…　あんた、また生き残ったのかい

entries.cn:
……你大致心里有数了吧？
那独臂鬼原本是何人……
entries.en:
... You know, don't you?
You know who the one-armed demon was before...
entries.jp:
…何となくは分かってるんだろう？
あの片腕の鬼が、元は何者だったのか…
entries.cn_improved:
……你大致心里有数了吧？
那独臂鬼原本是何人……

entries.en: ... Some advice.
entries.jp: …あんた、覚えておきな

entries.cn: 怨嗟已经失去了累积之地
entries.en: The hatred he channeled has lost its vessel for now.
entries.jp: 怨嗟はもう、積もる先を失った
entries.cn_improved: 怨嗟已经失去了累积之地

entries.cn: 战争持续的话，世道将会变得更加残酷吧
entries.en: The longer the fires of war rage on, the more ashen this world will become.
entries.jp: 戦が続けば、世はもっと酷いことになるだろう
entries.cn_improved: 战争持续的话，世道将会变得更加残酷吧

entries.cn: ……即便如此，你也不用取而代之替人承受
entries.en: ... That does not mean you should step into his place.
entries.jp: …だからって、あんたが替わりになることはないんだよ
entries.cn_improved: ……即便如此，你也不用取而代之替人承受

entries.en: Now then, be gone already.
entries.jp: さあ、もうお行き

entries.en: You have your duties...
entries.jp: あんたには、あんたのお役目が…

entries.en: Things you must accomplish, yes?
entries.jp: 為すべきことが、あるんだろう？

entries.en: Oh...? You survived?
entries.jp: へえ…　あんたが生き残ったのかい

entries.cn:
……你大致心里有数了吧？
那独臂鬼原本是何人……
entries.en:
... You know, don't you?
You know who the one-armed demon was before...
entries.jp:
…何となくは分かってるんだろう？
あの片腕の鬼が、元は何者だったのか…
entries.cn_improved:
……你大致心里有数了吧？
那独臂鬼原本是何人……

entries.en: Yes...
entries.jp: ああ…

entries.cn: 哼……那就不要垂头丧气的啊
entries.en: (Hmph...) Then you know there's no reason to lose heart.
entries.jp: ふん…　だったら、しょげっかえるじゃあないよ
entries.cn_improved: 哼……那就不要垂头丧气的啊

entries.cn:
虽长年雕刻佛像
却仍被怨嗟之火煎熬，化为鬼受折磨……
entries.en:
To carve and sculpt buddhas for so long, 
only to be wreathed in the flames of hatred and turn into a demon...
entries.jp:
ずっと仏を彫り続けてなお
怨嗟の炎に焼かれ、鬼となり苦しむは
entries.cn_improved:
虽长年雕刻佛像
却仍被怨嗟之火煎熬，化为鬼受折磨……

entries.cn: ……这都是那家伙自身造成的因果
entries.en: ... It was the fate he made for himself, to pay for his own mistakes.
entries.jp: …あ奴の自業、因果なのさ
entries.cn_improved: ……这都是那家伙自身造成的因果

entries.cn: 你结束了这些。送走了他
entries.en: And you put an end to that. You sent him on his way.
entries.jp: あんたはそれを終わらせた。送ったんだよ
entries.cn_improved: 你结束了这些。送走了他

entries.en: ... I'm sure he's grateful for that...
entries.jp: …あ奴も、きっと感謝しているさね…

entries.en: No...
entries.jp: いや…

entries.en: (Hmph...) I see. It might be better that way.
entries.jp: ふん…そうかい。その方がいいかもしれないね

entries.cn:
有人因某种因果，被怨嗟之火煎熬
化为鬼承受折磨……
entries.en:
What a fate, to be set ablaze in the fires of hatred
 and suffer eternally as a demon...
entries.jp:
何の因果か、怨嗟の炎に焼かれ
鬼となり苦しむ者がいた…
entries.cn_improved:

entries.en: Any more business with me, friend?
entries.jp: 旦那、まだ商いが必要かね？

entries.en: That's right.
entries.jp: ああ

entries.en: Hehe, thought so.
entries.jp: へへ、やっぱりか

entries.cn: 那么，要不要买我的情报呢？
entries.en: In that case, I've got information that might... peak your interest.
entries.jp: だったら、俺の情報を買わないか？
entries.cn_improved: 那么，要不要买我的情报呢？

entries.cn: 忍者的话懂的吧？情报的价值
entries.en: Surely a shinobi like you understands the value of good information.
entries.jp: 忍びなら、分かるだろう？情報の価値ってやつが
entries.cn_improved: 忍者的话懂的吧？情报的价值

entries.en: Hehe, I see.  Fair enough.
entries.jp: へへ、まあ、そうくるわな

entries.en: Anyways, you came at a good time.
entries.jp: ともあれ、丁度いいや

entries.cn: 大爷，要不要买我的情报呢？
entries.en: Wanna buy some information, friend?
entries.jp: 旦那、俺の情報を買わないかい？
entries.cn_improved: 大爷，要不要买我的情报呢？

entries.en: Ah, so you're looking for goods instead of info, huh?
entries.jp: …ああ、情報以外の品のことか

entries.cn: 因为从前的习惯，不自觉就收集了
entries.en: I've always had sticky fingers, I guess. I end up collecting lots without really noticing.
entries.jp: 昔の手癖でな。つい、集めっちまうのさ
entries.cn_improved: 因为从前的习惯，不自觉就收集了

entries.cn:
厌倦了那些供养啊供养的，就脱离了同伙……
不过一看到尸体，还是无法放着不管
entries.en:
I got fed up with all the offerings and memorials, so I left the Mob, but...
When I see a dead body, I can't leave it unpilfered.
entries.jp:
供養供養が嫌になって、一味も抜けたが…
死体をみると、やっぱり、放っておけなくてな
entries.cn_improved:
厌倦了那些供养啊供养的，就脱离了同伙……
不过一看到尸体，还是无法放着不管

entries.en: Besides, property can belong to anyone, right?
entries.jp: …それにまあ、品に貴賤もないだろう？

entries.en: (Laughs.)
entries.jp: ハハハハッ

entries.cn:
……啊，大爷
去苇名城的话要小心哦
entries.en:
Hey, friend.
If you're going to Ashina Castle, be careful.
entries.jp:
…ああ、旦那
葦名の城に行くのなら、注意しろよ
entries.cn_improved:
……啊，大爷
去苇名城的话要小心哦

entries.cn: 奇怪的家伙，差不多要大批大批地混进去了
entries.en: They've got all kinds of strange ones there now, and lots of 'em, at that.
entries.jp: おかしな奴らが、いよいよ大量に、入り込んでいやがる
entries.cn_improved: 奇怪的家伙，差不多要大批大批地混进去了

entries.cn:
内府那帮家伙，虽然怕苇名一心……
差不多也快要麻木了吧
entries.en:
I know the Interior Ministers are afraid of Isshin Ashina,
but it looks like they found their nerve.
entries.jp:
内府方め、葦名一心は怖いが…
いい加減痺れもきれてきた、ってとこだろうさ
entries.cn_improved:
内府那帮家伙，虽然怕苇名一心……
差不多也快要麻木了吧

entries.en: Tide might be turning for Ashina...
entries.jp: …そろそろ、葦名も潮時かねえ…

entries.cn: ……那个死不透的武士，终于还是死了呢
entries.en: Looks like that damned near immortal samurai's finally gone and died.
entries.jp: …あの死にぞこないの侍、やっと死ねたみてえだな
entries.cn_improved: ……那个死不透的武士，终于还是死了呢

entries.cn: 真是的，认真的武士在想些什么，还真让人捉摸不透
entries.en: I tell you, I don't understand what goes on in the mind of an honest samurai.
entries.jp: まったく、真面目侍の考えることは、分からんぜ
entries.cn_improved: 真是的，认真的武士在想些什么，还真让人捉摸不透

entries.cn: 死不了的话，那快活地活着不就好了吗……
entries.en: If you're not gonna die, you should go off and enjoy yourself.
entries.jp: 死なぬなら、楽しく生きればよいものをよ…
entries.cn_improved: 死不了的话，那快活地活着不就好了吗……

entries.en: Anyways, nice job friend.
entries.jp: …ともあれ、旦那、ご苦労だったな

entries.en: I'm sure he went to heaven.
entries.jp: あいつ、きっと成仏しているさ

entries.en: (Laughs.)
entries.jp: ハハハハッ

entries.cn: 啊啊，佛师爷爷的话，不知道去哪了
entries.en: Oh, if you're looking for the Sculptor, he's gone.
entries.jp: ああ、仏師の爺さんなら、消えちまったぜ
entries.cn_improved: 啊啊，佛师爷爷的话，不知道去哪了

entries.cn: 晃晃悠悠，一边说着火如何如何……
entries.en: He stumbled off muttering something about "the flames..."
entries.jp: ふらふらと、炎がどうとか言いながら…
entries.cn_improved: 晃晃悠悠，一边说着火如何如何……

entries.cn: 估计是前往战场去了吧
entries.en: I think he was heading towards the battlefield.
entries.jp: 多分、戦場に向かったんだろう
entries.cn_improved: 估计是前往战场去了吧

entries.en: But where he went and why he went there's none of my business.
entries.jp: …俺には、関係のないことだがよ…

entries.en: Until next time, friend.
entries.jp: じゃあな、旦那

entries.en: (Wheezing)
What's wrong with you?
entries.jp: お主…　どうした？

entries.en: F-Friend... I can't... breathe...
entries.jp: だ、旦那…　息が…　できねえ…

entries.cn: 混、混帐……怎能就这么死了……
entries.en: D-Damn it... I'm not gonna die here...
entries.jp: ち、畜生め…　このまま死んで、たまるかよ…
entries.cn_improved: 混、混帐……怎能就这么死了……

entries.en: (wheezing)
You've caught it, too..
entries.jp: お主も…

entries.en: Drink this...
entries.jp: これを、飲め…

entries.en: (Gulps)
entries.jp: う…　ゴクリ…

entries.en: Th-Thanks...
entries.jp: あ、ありがとよ・・・

entries.en: (Wheezing)
(wheezing)
(wheezing and coughing up blood)
entries.jp: ゼヒ…ゼヒ…ゴホッゴホッ

entries.en: I'm taking a blood sample.
entries.jp: 血をもらうぞ

entries.en: ... Now to bring this to Lady Emma.
entries.jp: …これを、エマ殿に

entries.en: Hey, friend! I've been waiting for you.
entries.jp: おお、旦那、待ってたんだ

entries.cn: 多亏了你的药，我得救了。太感谢了
entries.en: That medicine saved my life. I can't thank you enough.
entries.jp: あんたの薬のおかげで、助かった。感謝するぜ
entries.cn_improved: 多亏了你的药，我得救了。太感谢了

entries.cn: 这是谢礼。能帮上大爷的忙就好了
entries.en: Here, take this. Hopefully you'll find it useful.
entries.jp: これは、礼だ。旦那の役に立つといいが
entries.cn_improved: 这是谢礼。能帮上大爷的忙就好了

entries.en: Of course, I've got plenty of other tidbits lined up.
entries.jp: …もちろん、他にもネタは揃ってるぜ

entries.en: ... Yet another who is lost in the Halls of Illusion?
entries.jp: …そなたも、この幻廊に迷い込まれましたか？

entries.cn: 而且身负使命……想要离开这里……
entries.en: I believe you are on a mission... and wish to leave this place...
entries.jp: そして使命を持ち…　ここを出たがっている…
entries.cn_improved: 而且身负使命……想要离开这里……

entries.en: Yes.
entries.jp: ああ

entries.cn: 那么，就去抓画在屏风里的几只猴子吧
entries.en: Then you must defeat the monkeys depicted on the panels at the hall entrance.
entries.jp: それならば、屏風に描かれた猿たちを、掴まえなされ
entries.cn_improved: 那么，就去抓画在屏风里的几只猴子吧

entries.cn: 那样一来，御子殿下便会邀请你了
entries.en: Once you have done so, the Divine Child's voice will reach you.
entries.jp: さすれば、御子様のお声がかかりましょうや
entries.cn_improved: 那样一来，御子殿下便会邀请你了

entries.en: Is there something you would like to ask me?
entries.jp: 何か、聞きたいことでもおありですか？

entries.en: I will tell you anything that is within the realm of my knowledge.
entries.jp: 私に分かるものなら、お教えしましょう

entries.en: ... Why have you returned?
entries.jp: …そなた、なぜ戻られた？

entries.cn:
使命什么的，这里肯定没有
还请安静地……回去吧
entries.en:
As you do not have any missions to complete here,
I ask that you leave... quietly.
entries.jp:
使命など、決してここにはありませんゆえ
どうか静かに…お帰りくださいませ
entries.cn_improved:
使命什么的，这里肯定没有
还请安静地……回去吧

entries.en: ... Why have you returned?
entries.jp: …そなた、なぜ戻られた？

entries.cn:
我也好小太郎也好……只想心无旁骛地待在这里
还请安静地……回去吧
entries.en:
Kotaro and I both...wish to remain here free from distraction.
I ask that you leave... quietly.
entries.jp:
私も、小太郎さんも…　ただ無心に、ここにありたいのです
どうか静かに…お帰り下さいませ
entries.cn_improved:
我也好小太郎也好……只想心无旁骛地待在这里
还请安静地……回去吧

entries.cn: 紫色和服的猴子是“观猴”
entries.en: The monkey in the purple kimono is the "seeing monkey".
entries.jp: 紫着物の猿は、「見る猿」です
entries.cn_improved: 紫色和服的猴子是“观猴”

entries.cn: 其视力极佳，眼观六路，善发觉……
entries.en: He has excellent eyesight, can see great distances, and is very attentive...
entries.jp: 目がよく、遠くまで見え、よく気が付く…
entries.cn_improved: 其视力极佳，眼观六路，善发觉……

entries.cn: 通常在靠近前就会被它发现，然后被逃掉吧
entries.en: If he spots you, he will run immediately.
entries.jp: 尋常なら、近付く前に姿を見られ、逃げられてしまうでしょう
entries.cn_improved: 通常在靠近前就会被它发现，然后被逃掉吧

entries.cn: 是一只极度胆小的猴子
entries.en: He is exceedingly timid.
entries.jp: ひどく臆病な猿ですゆえに
entries.cn_improved: 是一只极度胆小的猴子

entries.cn: 绿色和服的猴子是“闻猴”
entries.en: The monkey in the green kimono is the "hearing monkey".
entries.jp: 緑着物の猿は、「聞く猿」です
entries.cn_improved: 绿色和服的猴子是“闻猴”

entries.cn: 其听力极佳，耳听八方，善发觉……
entries.en: he has excellent hearing, can hear across great distances, and is very attentive...
entries.jp: 耳がよく、遠くまでよく聞こえ、よく気が付く…
entries.cn_improved: 其听力极佳，耳听八方，善发觉……

entries.cn: 通常在靠近前就会被听见，然后被逃掉吧
entries.en: He will generally run away the moment he hears you coming, making it hard to approach.
entries.jp: 尋常なら、近付く前に音に気付かれ、逃げられてしまうでしょう
entries.cn_improved: 通常在靠近前就会被听见，然后被逃掉吧

entries.cn: 是一只极度胆小的猴子
entries.en: He is exceedingly timid.
entries.jp: ひどく臆病な猿ですゆえに
entries.cn_improved: 是一只极度胆小的猴子

entries.cn: 橙色和服的猴子是“言猴”
entries.en: The monkey in the orange kimono is the "speaking monkey".
entries.jp: 橙着物の猿は、「言う猿」です
entries.cn_improved: 橙色和服的猴子是“言猴”

entries.cn: 视力听力都不能说得上好
entries.en: While he does not have particularly good eyesight or hearing...
entries.jp: 目も耳も、特によいということはないのですが
entries.cn_improved: 视力听力都不能说得上好

entries.cn: 不过一见人便会大声吵嚷，猴子们全都会逃掉
entries.en: He makes a big fuss when he sees a threat, causing all other monkeys to run.
entries.jp: 人を見れば大騒ぎして、猿たちは皆、逃げてしまいます
entries.cn_improved: 不过一见人便会大声吵嚷，猴子们全都会逃掉

entries.en: Or perhaps he merely enjoys toying with humans?
entries.jp: あるいは、人をからかっているのでしょうか

entries.cn: 啊，我并不想离开这幻廊
entries.en: I do not wish to leave the Halls of Illusion.
entries.jp: ああ、私は、幻廊を出たいとは思いません
entries.cn_improved: 啊，我并不想离开这幻廊

entries.cn:
这里通常都很清静，我感觉……
某种意义上接近佛祖大人的开悟
entries.en:
It is usually quiet here, which means it is near to nirvana in its own way.
... At least that is how it feels to me.
entries.jp:
ここは大抵静かですし、ある意味、仏様の悟りに近しい
…そんな風に感じるのです
entries.cn_improved:
这里通常都很清静，我感觉……
某种意义上接近佛祖大人的开悟

entries.cn: 希望你能抓到那些猴子
entries.en: I pray that you succeed.
entries.jp: そなたが猿たちを掴まえられるよう、願っていますよ
entries.cn_improved: 希望你能抓到那些猴子

entries.en: ... Oh yes, by the way...
entries.jp: …ああ、そう言えば…

entries.cn: 曾经有像你一样背负使命之人
entries.en: There was once someone who, like you, was on a mission.
entries.jp: かつてあなたと同じく、使命ある者がおりました
entries.cn_improved: 曾经有像你一样背负使命之人

entries.cn:
我想他应该是追逐了一段时间猴子……
不知何时却没有动静了
entries.en:
I believe he chased the monkeys for a while but...
Everything here eventually went silent.
entries.jp:
暫らく猿たちを追いかけていたと思いますが…
いつか静かになりました
entries.cn_improved:
我想他应该是追逐了一段时间猴子……
不知何时却没有动静了

entries.en: ...I pray that you succeed.
entries.jp: …そなたが猿たちを掴まえられるよう、願っていますよ

entries.cn:
哼……那家伙说的废物狼……
似乎不见了啊……
entries.en:
...he said I'd find a cowardly wolf here.
No sign of him though...
entries.jp:
フン…　あやつの言っていた、腑抜けの狼…
おらんようだな…
entries.cn_improved:
哼……那家伙说的废物狼……
似乎不见了啊……

entries.cn:
……因无能而败北，活在羞耻中的忍者
我本来还想见识见识的……没机会了呢
entries.en:
... A broken and incompetent shinobi living in disgrace.
I hoped to see such a man for myself, but seems I'm out of luck.
entries.jp:
…無能故破れ、生き恥を晒す忍びなど
一度見てみたかったが…　是非もないか
entries.cn_improved:
……因无能而败北，活在羞耻中的忍者
我本来还想见识见识的……没机会了呢

entries.cn: 若真是不死，机会还有的是吧……
entries.en: And if he truly cannot die, I'm sure I'll run into him at some point...
entries.jp: 誠に死なぬなら、機会はいくらでもあろうてのう…
entries.cn_improved: 若真是不死，机会还有的是吧……

entries.cn: 哦，你是……那家伙所说的狼吗？
entries.en: Oh... you... Are you the wolf... he spoke of?
entries.jp: ほう、貴様…　あやつの言っていた、狼か？
entries.cn_improved: 哦，你是……那家伙所说的狼吗？

entries.cn: 不过看来不是什么废物……
entries.en: You don't look all that cowardly...
entries.jp: 腑抜けではないようじゃが…
entries.cn_improved: 不过看来不是什么废物……

entries.cn: 也好。就让我来试试，你是否真的死不了
entries.en: That matters not. They say you're immortal... let's see if that's true.
entries.jp: まあよい。誠に死なぬものか、試させてもらおう
entries.cn_improved: 也好。就让我来试试，你是否真的死不了

entries.cn: 喂，你……是那家伙所说的狼吗？
entries.en: Hey, you there.  Are you the wolf they spoke of?
entries.jp: おい、貴様…　あやつの言っていた、狼か？
entries.cn_improved: 喂，你……是那家伙所说的狼吗？

entries.en: Bastard!!
entries.jp: 貴様っ！

entries.en: For the sake of my son...
entries.jp: 我が息子のため…

entries.en: Put down your sword.
entries.jp: その刀、置いてゆけ

entries.en: I will not.
entries.jp: …できぬ

entries.en: You are a fool.
entries.jp: 愚かなり

entries.cn: 区区刀刃，穿不透这铠甲
entries.en: Your sword cannot pierce my armor.
entries.jp: 刃など、この甲冑には通じぬ
entries.cn_improved: 区区刀刃，穿不透这铠甲

entries.en: Why do you not understand?
entries.jp: なぜ、それを解さぬか…
ぬっ！？

entries.cn: ……不会的，铠甲不会动摇。也不会掉落
entries.en: My armor is immovable.  I cannot fall.
entries.jp: …いや、甲冑は動じぬ。落ちもせぬ
entries.cn_improved: ……不会的，铠甲不会动摇。也不会掉落

entries.en: Ugh!  Trying to topple me off the edge?!
entries.jp: ぐぬうっ！　やはり、落とす気か！

entries.en: Do not kick my prized armor!
entries.jp: 我が甲冑を、足蹴にするなっ！

entries.en: Strike me all you like, I am unbreakable.
entries.jp: 千本には、程遠い…

entries.cn: 愿那孩子，享有变若的恩惠……
entries.en: My son will receive the waters...
entries.jp: あの子に、変若の恵みあれ…
entries.cn_improved: 愿那孩子，享有变若的恩惠……

entries.en: Roberrrrrrt!!
entries.jp: ロバアァーーーート！

entries.en: Arrrrrrrghhh!
entries.jp: うあぁぁーーーー！

entries.en: Damn noisy birds...
entries.jp: カラスがうるさいのぅ

entries.en: That red-faced brute is fearsome indeed.
entries.jp: 赤鬼の恐ろしき事よ

entries.en: Things could get quite out of hand without a proper flame...
entries.jp: 火を使わねば手が付けられぬわ

entries.en: Did you hear?
entries.jp: おぬし、例の噂を聞いたか

entries.cn: 可是说，城后谷底至今仍被红叶染得通红？
entries.en: They say the leaves are still a deep red beyond the gorge behind the castle.
entries.jp: 城の裏手の谷底は、いまだ紅葉で赤く染まっておる、という話か

entries.en: What a curious thought...
entries.jp: そうじゃ、奇怪な話よ

entries.en: The voices...they call from below...
entries.jp: 崖下から、誰ぞ呼んでおるわ…

entries.cn: 呵呵…老朽，也是时候了么
entries.en: Heh heh... Could it finally be my time?
entries.jp: くく…儂も潮時ということか

entries.cn: 可恨那群蜈蚣…竟以隐佛间为自家，盘踞下来…
entries.en:
Blasted vermin...swarming the
hidden temple as if they own the place...
entries.jp: 忌々しいムカデどもめ… 我が物顔で隠し仏間に住み着きおって…

entries.cn: 然而它们所使的『火焰之术』，端的骇人
entries.en: Still, the flame techniques they use are quite something.
entries.jp: じゃが、奴らの使う「火炎の術」は、すさまじい

entries.en: Surely even the red-faced ogre would shrink at the sight.
entries.jp: 赤鬼すらも、奴らを恐れておる

entries.cn: 【未实装】偷听（提示：【皇子在月见橹】）
entries.en: Eavesdrop dummy text (the Imperial Prince is in the Moon-view tower)
entries.jp: 盗み聞きダミー（「皇子が月見櫓にいる」というヒント会話）

entries.cn: 那赤鬼，纵戴着手枷，亦无法节制
entries.en: That bastard red-faced brute. Even in chains he's out of control.
entries.jp: 赤鬼め、手枷があっても手が付けられぬわ

entries.en: But y'know what they say: "The red ogre fears the flame."
entries.jp: だが、赤鬼は“火に怯む”ようじゃ

entries.cn: 啊，马厩那边的卖货人，曾这般说过
entries.en: Ahh. The peddler near the stables was mumbling something about that.
entries.jp: ああ、馬小屋の方におる物売りが、そう言っておったな

entries.cn: 平田庄逃出之流民里，唯她一人尚有几分清明
entries.en: She's the only one of those Hirata drifters with any sense left.
entries.jp: 平田屋敷からの流れ者で、まともなのは、あやつだけよ

entries.en: What's the status of the "Imperial Prince"?
entries.jp: “御子様”の様子は、どうじゃ？

entries.en: He's been in the "moon-view tower" the whole day, with his books.
entries.jp: ひがな一日、“月見櫓”で書を読んでおられるわ

entries.cn: 一个孩童，需如此戒备么？
entries.en: Do we really need all these guards for one little kid?
entries.jp: たかが子供に、これほどの見張りが必要なのか？

entries.cn:
毕竟是平田之遗孤
那是不祥之血脉
entries.en:
Guess it's because they picked him up at Hirata.
An orphan from the ill-fated bloodline.
entries.jp:
平田の遺児ゆえ、であろうな
不吉な血筋よ

entries.cn: 那【崖边破房】里的，老婆子
entries.en: That old hag in the "abandoned building by the cliff".
entries.jp: “崖際のあばら家”の、クソ婆め

entries.en: Won't she ever give it a rest with that bloody "bell"?
entries.jp: 飽きもせず、まぁた“鈴”を鳴らしておる

entries.cn:
实在叫人毛骨悚然
平田之遗民，皆是疯子
entries.en:
I hear ya. Gives me the creeps.
None of the ones from Hirata survived with their senses.
entries.jp:
まっこと、気味が悪いわ
平田の生き残りは、気狂いばかりじゃ

entries.en: Doesn't matter. It's a cold one this year.
entries.jp: ま、幸い、今年は冷える

entries.cn: 那对母子，应捱不过此冬
entries.en: Doubt she or her son will last the winter.
entries.jp: あの親子、この冬は越せぬであろう

entries.cn:
说到此苇名之最强者……
会是谁
entries.en: Who would you say is the strongest in all of Ashina?
entries.jp:
この葦名にて最強、と言えば…
誰じゃろうか

entries.en: It's gotta be Lord Gyoubu Oniwa.
entries.jp: やはり、鬼庭形部さまよ

entries.cn:
【苇名有【鬼形部】】
看看前方战场之尸山，便一目了然
entries.en:
"Gyoubu, the Demon of Ashina".
That mountain of corpses on the battlefield past here says it all.
entries.jp:
「葦名に“鬼形部”あり」
この先の戦場跡の屍の山を見れば、一目で分かろう

entries.cn:
然而那鬼形部
相传过去曾有过一次失手
entries.en: But they say that even Gyoubu the Demon was once felled.
entries.jp:
だが、その鬼形部も
かつて一度だけ、遅れを取ったことがあるというぞ

entries.cn: 是因【忍者所用爆竹】，惊了爱马【鬼鹿毛】
entries.en: His beloved steed Onikage was spooked by some "shinobi firecrackers".
entries.jp: “忍びの使う爆竹”で、愛馬の“鬼鹿毛”が怯んだためとか

entries.cn: 哦，那匹巨马，也会惧爆竹么
entries.en: Oh ho, that massive horse? Frightened by firecrackers?
entries.jp: ほう、あの巨大な馬も、爆竹には怯んだか

entries.cn: 那忍者之名，似是叫，木菟……
entries.en: Said the shinobi went by the name of Horned Owl...
entries.jp: 忍びの名は、ミミズクとか、言ったかのう…

entries.cn:
他令【平田屋】之忍者同伙
为他做了爆竹所需之【特别火药】
entries.en:
Had "special gunpowder" made for him
by his mates at the "Hirata Estate".
entries.jp:
“平田屋敷”の忍び仲間に
その爆竹のための、“特別な火薬”を作らせておったそうだ

entries.cn:
貌似兄长之野盗：此堂上了锁
咕哈哈，里头定有大笔财宝！
entries.en:
Older Bandit: This shrine's bloody locked.
Guhah hah, there's bound to be heaps of treasure inside!
entries.jp:
兄らしき野盗：この堂、鍵がかかってやがる
ぐはは、中にはきっとお宝が、たんまりだぞ！

entries.cn:
貌似弟弟之野盗：财宝？那真是好啊，大哥
须告与重藏大人才是
entries.en:
Younger Bandit: Treasure? Sounds good, brother.
We should hurry and tell Lord Juzou.
entries.jp:
弟らしき野盗：お宝かぁ、そいつはいいね、兄貴ぃ
重蔵さまに、おしらせしなきゃだなぁ

entries.cn: 貌似兄长之野盗：蠢蛋！莫告与头领！
entries.en: Older Bandit: Idiot! Don't tell the boss!
entries.jp: 兄らしき野盗：タコか！　おカシラには黙ってろ！

entries.cn: 貌似弟弟之野盗：被骂蠢蛋，对不住
entries.en: Younger Bandit: Sorry, brother.
entries.jp: 弟らしき野盗：タコで、ごめんよぉ

entries.cn:
貌似兄长之野盗：诶，弟弟啊，
这附近必有持钥之人
定是藏起来了，去寻！
entries.en:
Older Bandit: You know what?
Someone around here must be hiding a key.
We gotta find it!
entries.jp:
兄らしき野盗：なぁ、弟よ、
このへんに鍵を持ってるやつがいるはずだ
きっと隠れてる、探すぞ！

entries.cn:
哎，搬那沉重之胴铠
着实费力
entries.en:
Hell's teeth, lugging that heavy chest plate
was hard work.
entries.jp:
やれやれ、あの重い胴鎧を運ぶのも
一苦労だったわ

entries.cn:
不过，给下人披上胴铠
仗着其巨躯与膂力，刀又难透，便是无敌啊
entries.en:
Still, no sword will be a match for that armour,
especially when we fit those giant louts with it.
entries.jp:
だが、胴鎧を着せた下男ならば
あの巨体と強力に、さらに刀も通さぬゆえ、無敵よな

entries.cn: 然而，若有【剥铠】，或可一较高下
entries.en: ... Unless someone rips it off.
entries.jp: だが、「鎧剥ぎ」があれば、太刀打ちできるかもしれぬ

entries.en: How would they do that?
entries.jp: 鎧剥ぎ？

entries.cn: 隐牢之役所里，有一杆忍者专用之奇枪
entries.en: Say, by using a special lance from the Hidden Jail gatehouse.
entries.jp: 隠し牢の詰め所にある、忍びの特別な槍よ

entries.cn: 可恶，那不知天高地厚的逃忍
entries.en: That flipping fugitive ninja is pushing his luck.
entries.jp: おのれ、あのお調子者の抜け忍め

entries.en: Just how long is he going to keep up this chase?
entries.jp: どこまで逃げれば気が済むのか

entries.cn:
城蛇谷一带，似有人闹腾
我亦去那边搜搜
entries.en:
There was word of someone causing a stir
around Hebitani. Maybe I should check it out.
entries.jp:
城の蛇谷側で、何やら騒いでおった者がおると言うが
そちらも探してみるかのう

entries.en: About Valley Mercenary Snipers
entries.jp: 盗み聞き：谷敵スナイパーについて

entries.cn: 偷听：关于夜叉猿（无首）之移动
entries.en: About Headless Yasha Ape's relocation
entries.jp: 盗み聞き：夜叉猿(首なし)の移動について

entries.en: Next time, we will succeed...
entries.jp: 次こそは、成就させる…

entries.en: We will achieve...true immortality.
entries.jp: 不死を…　必ず、なして見せるわ

entries.cn:
赤目之【伪物】，惧火
此乃不可
entries.en:
The red-eyes fear the flame. A travesty.
This will not do.
entries.jp:
赤目の“まがいもの”どもは、炎を恐れおる
あれでは、駄目だ
塩が足りていない事に関する会話

entries.cn: 【未实装】暗示曾将刀刺入佛师鬼右手之对话
entries.jp: 仏師鬼の右手に刀を刺した事を示唆する会話
堀の終端に抜け穴があるが

entries.cn: 弦一郎大人吩咐，那处亦须看守
entries.jp: 弦一郎様は、あそこも見張りせよと仰せだ

entries.cn: 不过外头是古战场之芒原狐与貉之类，方会经过
entries.jp: だが、外は古戦場のススキ野原だ狐や貉くらいしか、通らないぞ

entries.cn: 月见橹今晚也被月光照耀着……
entries.en: The moonlight shines strongly on the Moon-view Tower tonight...
entries.jp: 月見櫓が、今宵も月に照らされておる…
entries.cn_improved: 月见橹今晚也被月光照耀着……

entries.cn: 御子殿下又在月光下读书了吧
entries.en: The Divine Heir is probably using the light for his reading again...
entries.jp: 御子様はまた、月明かりで書をお読みかのう
entries.cn_improved: 御子殿下又在月光下读书了吧

entries.en: Probably.
entries.jp: そうじゃなあ

entries.cn: 还只是个孩子就被囚禁着，真是可怜啊
entries.en: But imprisoning a mere child... I feel sorry for the boy.
entries.jp: まだほんの子供というに、囚われとは、気の毒なことじゃ
entries.cn_improved: 还只是个孩子就被囚禁着，真是可怜啊

entries.cn: 是啊……虽然弦一郎大人也是有他的考虑吧……
entries.en: Agreed.  But I'm sure Lord Genichiro has his reasons...
entries.jp: ああ…　弦一郎様も、何かお考えがあるのだろうが…
entries.cn_improved: 是啊……虽然弦一郎大人也是有他的考虑吧……

entries.cn: 月见橹的门有好好关着吗？
entries.en: The Moon-view Tower door... you checked that it's locked, right?
entries.jp: 月見櫓の扉は、ちゃんと閉まっておるか？
entries.cn_improved: 月见橹的门有好好关着吗？

entries.en: It's certainly locked, but...
entries.jp: 閉まっておるが…

entries.cn: 但墙上的洞还在那里啊
entries.en: Nobody fixed that hole in the wall...
entries.jp: 壁の穴は、そのままにしておるぞ
entries.cn_improved: 但墙上的洞还在那里啊

entries.en: That?  Don't worry about it.
entries.jp: ああ、そちらは心配いらぬだろう

entries.cn: 洞是在悬崖边，没人能从那边进去
entries.en: The hole faces the edge of a cliff.  No one could pass through it.
entries.jp: 穴は崖際じゃ、通えるものなどあるまいよ
entries.cn_improved: 洞是在悬崖边，没人能从那边进去

entries.cn: 这座桥的下面……护城河的尽头有个暗道吧
entries.en: You know the secret passage at the bottom of the moat, under the bridge?
entries.jp: この橋の下…　堀のどん詰まりに、抜け穴があるじゃろう
entries.cn_improved: 这座桥的下面……护城河的尽头有个暗道吧

entries.cn: 传令下来说那里也要把守
entries.en: We just got orders to guard it.
entries.jp: あそこも、見張りせよとの仰せじゃと
entries.cn_improved: 传令下来说那里也要把守

entries.en: Security's getting tight.
entries.jp: ふうむ…　なんとも厳戒なことじゃ

entries.en: War will be upon us very soon.
entries.jp: 戦が近いのかもしれんのう…

entries.cn: ……这场战争，到底能不能取胜呢？
entries.en: ... this battle... do you think it can be won?
entries.jp: …この戦、はたして勝てるものかのう？
entries.cn_improved: ……这场战争，到底能不能取胜呢？

entries.en: I fear we may not prevail.
entries.jp: どうにも、悪い予感がするのじゃ…

entries.en: What?  We'll be just fine!
entries.jp: 何を弱気なことを

entries.cn:
虽说病了，但一心大人还健在
弦一郎大人的弓也非常优秀
entries.en:
Look, Isshin may be sick, but he's still going strong.
And Genichiro is a terror with a bow.
entries.jp:
病身とはいえ、一心様はご健在
弦一郎様の弓も見事なものじゃ
entries.cn_improved:
虽说病了，但一心大人还健在
弦一郎大人的弓也非常优秀

entries.cn: 再加上，不是还有鬼形部大人嘛
entries.en: And of course, we have Gyoubu the Demon!
entries.jp: 加えて、鬼形部様もおるではないか
entries.cn_improved: 再加上，不是还有鬼形部大人嘛

entries.cn: 哦哦，鬼庭形部雅孝大人吗！
entries.en: Ahh, Gyoubu, of course!
entries.jp: おお、鬼庭形部雅孝様か！
entries.cn_improved: 哦哦，鬼庭形部雅孝大人吗！

entries.cn: 的确，那位大人和鬼鹿毛一起的话
entries.en: Good point.  As long as he's with us...
entries.jp: 確かに、あのお方と、鬼鹿毛が共にあれば
entries.cn_improved: 的确，那位大人和鬼鹿毛一起的话

entries.cn: 很难想象大手门会被攻破
entries.en: No man could ever breach the Ashina Castle gate.
entries.jp: 大手門が抜かれるなど、考えられぬわ
entries.cn_improved: 很难想象大手门会被攻破

entries.cn: 该死的赤鬼，只是绑住还是不能安心呀
entries.en: I don't feel safe with that big bastard just tied up next to us.
entries.jp: 赤鬼め、縛るだけでは不安じゃのう
entries.cn_improved: 该死的赤鬼，只是绑住还是不能安心呀

entries.cn: 开战前我们被袭的话可就太荒唐了
entries.en: I'd rather not be gravely injured just before the war begins.
entries.jp: 戦の前に、我らが襲われては、しょうもないわ
entries.cn_improved: 开战前我们被袭的话可就太荒唐了

entries.en: ...if the worst happens, only choice is to use fire.
entries.jp: …いざとなれば、火を使うしかあるまい

entries.cn: 它的红眼睛惧怕火，上头是这么指示的
entries.en: Those red eyes fear fire. That's what the lord's proclamation said.
entries.jp: 赤目は火を恐れる、そういうお達しじゃて
entries.cn_improved: 它的红眼睛惧怕火，上头是这么指示的

entries.cn: 指示吗……苇名的战斗方式也变了呢……
entries.en: Proclamations... what a joke.  Ashina sure has a funny way of preparing for war...
entries.jp: お達しねえ…　変わっちまったなあ、葦名の戦も…
entries.cn_improved: 指示吗……苇名的战斗方式也变了呢……

entries.en: Look... A smoke signal from the great castle gate.
entries.jp: 見ろ…　大手門に狼煙が上がっておる

entries.en: Is it Lord Gyoubu...?
entries.jp: 形部様か…

entries.en: Yes, that's definitely Gyoubu the Demon.
entries.jp: ああ、正に鬼形部

entries.cn: 有那位大人在，苇名仍然安泰啊
entries.en: Ashina is safe so long as that man guards her doors.
entries.jp: あのお方がおれば、葦名もまだまだ安泰よ
entries.cn_improved: 有那位大人在，苇名仍然安泰啊

entries.cn: 呜呜呜……小鹿毛啊……太可怜了，我的爱马啊……
entries.en: Kokage... My poor, poor horse...
entries.jp: ううう…　小鹿毛よう…　かわいそうな、おらの馬っこよう…
entries.cn_improved: 呜呜呜……小鹿毛啊……太可怜了，我的爱马啊……

entries.en: All it took was a bit of gunpowder, he startled...
entries.jp: 奴ら、爆竹なんぞで、脅かしよって…

entries.en: And now he's dead... Dead...
entries.jp: ううう…　死んじまった…　死んじまったよう…

entries.en: ... We burning this temple next, boss?
entries.jp: …兄貴、次はこのお堂ですかい

entries.cn: 不，这里不用管。去下一个地方吧
entries.en: No, leave it. Go on to the next one.
entries.jp: いや、そこはいい。次に行くぞ
entries.cn_improved: 不，这里不用管。去下一个地方吧

entries.cn: ……可是，能拿到贡品的话，献给重蔵大人……
entries.en: ... But, if there's any offerings we could give them to Lord Juzou...
entries.jp: …けんど、供え物でもあれば、重蔵さまに…
entries.cn_improved: ……可是，能拿到贡品的话，献给重蔵大人……

entries.en: Enough!
entries.jp: やめんか！

entries.cn:
不准动佛祖大人的东西……
到底要我说几遍才懂，你这笨蛋！
entries.en:
We don't take from Buddha...
How many times do I have to tell ya before it sinks into your thick skull?!
entries.jp:
仏様には手出し無用…
何度言やあ分かるんだ、タコが！
entries.cn_improved:
不准动佛祖大人的东西……
到底要我说几遍才懂，你这笨蛋！

entries.en: Please don't get angry at me, boss.
entries.jp: 怒らないでおくれよ、兄貴

entries.en: I'm sorry my skull's so thick...
entries.jp: タコで、ごめんよぉ…

entries.en: Hey, open up!  Open up or else!
entries.jp: おうっ！　ここを開けやがれ！

entries.cn: 我知道你偷偷藏在这里！
entries.en: I can hear you whispering in there!
entries.jp: コソコソと、隠れてるのは分かってんだ！
entries.cn_improved: 我知道你偷偷藏在这里！

entries.cn: 不乖乖投降的话，有你苦头吃！
entries.en: If you don't surrender peaceably now, you're gonna regret it later!
entries.jp: 大人しく投降しないと、痛い目みるぞ！
entries.cn_improved: 不乖乖投降的话，有你苦头吃！

entries.en: Hey, can you hear me?!  Hey!!
entries.jp: 聞こえてんのかあ！　おうっ！

entries.en: ... I bet the estate fire is totally out of control by now...
entries.jp: …屋敷は今ごろ、火の海よ

entries.cn:
嗯……如果要逃
肯定是从这个隐藏洞穴出来
entries.en: Yeah... If anyone's gonna get out, their only choice is to use this cave.
entries.jp:
ああ…　抜け出してくるとしたら
この隠し洞穴に違えねえ
entries.cn_improved:
嗯……如果要逃
肯定是从这个隐藏洞穴出来

entries.cn:
重蔵大人命令
不能放过一只老鼠
entries.en:
Don't let a single rat escape.
Lord Juzou's orders.
entries.jp:
重蔵さまの言いつけだ
鼠一匹、逃がすんじゃあないぞ
entries.cn_improved:
重蔵大人命令
不能放过一只老鼠

entries.en: I know.
entries.jp: 分かってるさ

entries.cn:
我本来就很讨厌那种
一有危险就只顾自己逃的卑鄙小人……
entries.en: And I don't mind at all.  I can't stand selfish bastards who leave everyone else behind at the first sign of danger...
entries.jp:
俺は元々、大っ嫌いなんだ
危なくなりゃあ自分だけ逃げだす、卑怯者がよ…
entries.cn_improved:
我本来就很讨厌那种
一有危险就只顾自己逃的卑鄙小人……

entries.en: ... It seems Isshin's illness is indeed grave.
entries.jp: …一心の病、やはり重いようじゃ

entries.cn:
嗯……即使有弦一郎
苇名国也不长了
entries.en:
The Land of Ashina will not last much longer,
even with Genichiro on our side.
entries.jp:
うむ…　たとえ弦一郎がおれど
葦名の国、長くはなさそうだの
entries.cn_improved:
嗯……即使有弦一郎
苇名国也不长了

entries.en: What about our other mission?
entries.jp: して、もう一つの任は？

entries.cn: ……城池的蛇谷一侧，似乎因为黑斗笠在骚乱
entries.en: ... Blackhat is fighting like a demon by the Serpent Valley side of the castle.
entries.jp: …城の蛇谷の側が、黒笠で騒がしいようじゃ
entries.cn_improved: ……城池的蛇谷一侧，似乎因为黑斗笠在骚乱

entries.cn: 那么，接下来就是那里了
entries.en: Then that's where we're going next.
entries.jp: ならば、次はそちらよ
entries.cn_improved: 那么，接下来就是那里了

entries.cn: 不过要小心啊……黑斗笠的貉，没那么容易杀死……
entries.en: But keep your wits about you... The Blackhat Badger won't go down without a fight...
entries.jp: だが、細心にな…　黒笠のムジナ、生半には殺れぬぞ…
entries.cn_improved: 不过要小心啊……黑斗笠的貉，没那么容易杀死……

entries.cn: ……真的打算把那个用到战场上吗？
entries.en: We're really planning to use that thing...in the battle?
entries.jp: …本当にあれを、戦に使うつもりかのう
entries.cn_improved: ……真的打算把那个用到战场上吗？

entries.en: I know, I know.  But what choice do we have?
entries.jp: ああ、だが、仕方なかろうて

entries.cn:
苇名现在已是生死存亡的关头
顾不了那么多吧
entries.en: Desperate times call for desperate measures.  We're in no position to worry about what others might think.
entries.jp:
葦名は今や、存亡の危機
なりふりなど構っておれぬでな
entries.cn_improved:
苇名现在已是生死存亡的关头
顾不了那么多吧

entries.en: Yes, but...
entries.jp: じゃが…

entries.cn:
好了！打起精神来，精神点！
那副样子的话，当心被卷进去啊
entries.en: Hey, keep it together, soldier. Keep talking like that, and they'll put you on its detail.
entries.jp:
ええい、しゃんとせい、しゃんと
そんな風では、巻き込まれっちまうぞ
entries.cn_improved:
好了！打起精神来，精神点！
那副样子的话，当心被卷进去啊

entries.cn: 一旦发怒就会不分敌我的吧
entries.en: And when it's mad, it doesn't discriminate between friend or foe.
entries.jp: 一度怒れば、敵味方の別など、なかろうてな
entries.cn_improved: 一旦发怒就会不分敌我的吧

entries.cn: 听说你给太郎兵穿上了盔甲
entries.en: I heard you were the one that put the armor on that big bugger from Taro Troop.
entries.jp: お主、太郎兵に鎧を着せたそうじゃな
entries.cn_improved: 听说你给太郎兵穿上了盔甲

entries.cn:
嗯，那家伙一直哭闹
真是个麻烦的差事
entries.en:
Yeah, he was making a stink about it.
It was a damned awful job.
entries.jp:
ああ、あ奴め、ぐずりおってな
まったく難儀な仕事じゃった
entries.cn_improved:
嗯，那家伙一直哭闹
真是个麻烦的差事

entries.en: But it looks like it paid off, didn't it?
entries.jp: だが、その甲斐はあったのでないか

entries.cn:
加上那巨大的身躯和力量
如今已是刀枪不入了啊
entries.en: He already had a huge frame and massive strength, and you just made him near impervious to blades.
entries.jp:
あの巨体と、強力に加え
いまや刃も通さぬのじゃからな
entries.cn_improved:
加上那巨大的身躯和力量
如今已是刀枪不入了啊

entries.cn:
嗯，是那样没错……
不过是硬给他穿上去的
entries.en:
That is true, but...
He doesn't like that armor, and he sure didn't like me putting it on him.
entries.jp:
まあ、その通りじゃが…
無理くり着せているからのう
entries.cn_improved:
嗯，是那样没错……
不过是硬给他穿上去的

entries.cn: 所以稍有动作，盔甲很快就会剥落的
entries.en: When a fight happens, it might come off easier than you think.
entries.jp: 何かあれば、鎧はすぐに剥がれっちまうさ
entries.cn_improved: 所以稍有动作，盔甲很快就会剥落的

entries.en: You're saying we don't have enough salt?
entries.jp: むう…　塩が足らぬと申すか

entries.en: Yes, sir... We use it for cooking, of course...
entries.jp: へえ…　食うのは勿論ですが…

entries.cn: 清理伤口、净化佛檀也是必需品……
entries.en: But we also use it on wounds and for purifying the dead...
entries.jp: 傷口や、仏さんの清めにも、入用でして…
entries.cn_improved: 清理伤口、净化佛檀也是必需品……

entries.cn: 即是说若这样死伤不断的话……
entries.en: So at the rate people are dying... we're out, then?
entries.jp: これだけ人死にが続いては…　ということじゃな
entries.cn_improved: 即是说若这样死伤不断的话……

entries.cn: 是……因此而患上战场病的人也不在少数
entries.en: Yes, sir... That's why many on the battlefield are falling ill...
entries.jp: へえ…　おかげで、戦場病に罹る者も、多うございます
entries.cn_improved: 是……因此而患上战场病的人也不在少数

entries.cn: 是吗……得想办法搞到盐才行啊……
entries.en: I see... We'll need to find a way to get some salt then...
entries.jp: そうか…　何とかして、塩を手に入れねばな…
entries.cn_improved: 是吗……得想办法搞到盐才行啊……

entries.en: Where's the next shift...?
entries.jp: ううーむ…　来ぬなあ…

entries.en: My watch ended a while ago,
entries.jp: 交代の刻限なぞ、とうに過ぎておるというに

entries.en: But no one's coming to take my place...
entries.jp: だあれも、来ぬではないか…

entries.en: Masanari...
entries.jp: 正就…

entries.cn: 如你之人居然会被打败……
entries.en: I never would have believed a man of your ability could be slain...
entries.jp: お前ほどの者が、討たれるとは…
entries.cn_improved: 如你之人居然会被打败……

entries.en: It appears as though a demon lurks within Ashina...
entries.jp: 葦名には、鬼が潜むようじゃのう…

entries.en: Hmm...
entries.jp: うーむ…

entries.cn: ……这个国家也差不多快结束了吧
entries.en: ... The tides will soon turn against this land...
entries.jp: …この国も、そろそろ潮時かのう
entries.cn_improved: ……这个国家也差不多快结束了吧

entries.en: I never would've thought the Interior Ministry would become our enemy...
entries.jp: よりにもよって、敵は内府方じゃ…

entries.cn: 老头子要是倒下了……便会一口气败退吧
entries.en: If the old lord falls... we'll be defeated swifly, no doubt.
entries.jp: 爺様が倒れちまったら…　一気に負け戦じゃろうて
entries.cn_improved: 老头子要是倒下了……便会一口气败退吧

entries.en: ... I'm wondering though, if that happens, will we still get paid?
entries.jp: …しかし、ちゃんと銭は出るのかのう？

entries.cn: 就算要逃跑，钱袋空空的啊……
entries.en: There's no point in running away with an empty purse...
entries.jp: 逃げるにしても、財布が軽くてはなあ…
entries.cn_improved: 就算要逃跑，钱袋空空的啊……

entries.en: Hmm...
entries.jp: うーむ…

entries.cn: 南无阿弥陀佛……南无阿弥陀佛……南无阿弥陀佛……
entries.en: ([Buddhist chanting] Namu Amida Butsu, Namu Amida Butsu...)
entries.jp: 南無阿弥陀仏…　南無阿弥陀仏…　南無阿弥陀仏…
entries.cn_improved: 南无阿弥陀佛……南无阿弥陀佛……南无阿弥陀佛……

entries.en: (Sigh...)
entries.jp: ふぅ…

entries.en: ... Everyone..  Forgive me.
entries.jp: …みな、済まぬなあ

entries.cn: 可是，你们又拿不出钱，我也不能把命搭进去……
entries.en: But nobody would put their life on the line for free...
entries.jp: じゃが、銭も出ぬのに、命は張れぬでのう…
entries.cn_improved: 可是，你们又拿不出钱，我也不能把命搭进去……

entries.en: All right, so... how do I make my escape...?
entries.jp: さて…　どうやって逃げたものか…

entries.en: Hmm...
entries.jp: うーむ…

entries.en: (Cackle...)
entries.jp: クックックッ…

entries.cn:
苇名的乡下忍者们
还不知是圈套，彻底上钩了
entries.en:
Those backwater Ashina shinobi...
took the bait beautifully, not even knowing it was a trap.
entries.jp:
葦名の田舎忍びどもめ
罠とも知らず、まんまと釣られおったわ
entries.cn_improved:
苇名的乡下忍者们
还不知是圈套，彻底上钩了

entries.en: How dumb can you be?
entries.jp: なんとも愚鈍なことよのう…

entries.cn:
苇名的乡下忍者们
还不知是圈套，彻底上钩了
entries.en:
Those backwater Ashina shinobi...
took the bait beautifully, not even knowing it was a trap.
entries.jp:
葦名の田舎忍びどもめ
まんまと釣られおったわ
entries.cn_improved:
苇名的乡下忍者们
还不知是圈套，彻底上钩了

entries.en: Impossible... How did...?
entries.jp: 嘘、じゃろ…　この…ワシがぁ？

entries.en: Taking the Hirata Estate was suprisingly easy.
entries.jp: 平田屋敷、存外に容易かったな

entries.cn: 也要多亏了有枭带路啊
entries.en: Owl's info was right on the money, you know?
entries.jp: 梟の手引きも、なかなかのものではないか
entries.cn_improved: 也要多亏了有枭带路啊

entries.en: ... I don't like him.
entries.jp: …オレは、好かねえなぁ

entries.cn: 那个老头，总觉得不靠谱
entries.en: There's something shifty about him... the smell of a crook.
entries.jp: あの爺は、どうにも胡散臭えや
entries.cn_improved: 那个老头，总觉得不靠谱

entries.en: (Gulp, gulp, gulp) Ahh...
entries.jp: グビッグビッグビッ…　プハアァ…

entries.cn: 那是背信弃义……绝对的背信弃义啊，正就先生啊……
entries.en: He's a villain... a down and out villain, Masanari...
entries.jp: あれは、外道…　ド外道だぜ、正就さんよう…
entries.cn_improved: 那是背信弃义……绝对的背信弃义啊，正就先生啊……

entries.en: Well... he's useful right now, so endure him.
entries.jp: まあ、我慢しろ

entries.cn: 不管他有什么企图，不过是乡下的落单忍者
entries.en: For all his scheming, he's a nameless, rogue shinobi.
entries.jp: いかに企もうと、所詮は田舎のはぐれ忍び
entries.cn_improved: 不管他有什么企图，不过是乡下的落单忍者

entries.en: His efforts won't amount to much.
entries.jp: 何ができることもあるまい…

entries.en: (Buuurp.)
entries.jp: ゲエエエップ

entries.cn: 嘁……我只要给足钱和酒，就没什么可说的
entries.en: Heh.  I'm not complaining so long as there's coin and booze in it.
entries.jp: ケッ…　オレは、銭と酒さえ都合してもらえりゃあ、文句はねえさ
entries.cn_improved: 嘁……我只要给足钱和酒，就没什么可说的

entries.en: ... Lord Isshin, I will be borrowing this.
entries.jp: …一心様、お借りいたします

entries.en: Please watch over me...
entries.jp: 見ていて下され…

entries.cn: 这场战争，我等苇名众必定……
entries.en: We, the Ashina clan, will win this battle...
entries.jp: この戦、我ら葦名衆が、必ずや…
entries.cn_improved: 这场战争，我等苇名众必定……

entries.cn: ……一心大人，所借之物，还给您了
entries.en: ... Lord Isshin, I am returning what I borrowed.
entries.jp: …一心様、借り物、お返しいたす
entries.cn_improved: ……一心大人，所借之物，还给您了

entries.en: Lord Isshin... please watch over me...
entries.jp: 一心様…　見ていて下され…

entries.en: ... Did you kill them all?
entries.jp: …すべて、斬ったか

entries.en: I did...
entries.jp: はい…

entries.cn: 好……待弦一郎大人回来便开始吧
entries.en: Good... We will begin when Lord Genichiro returns.
entries.jp: よし…　弦一郎様が戻られたら、はじめるぞ
entries.cn_improved: 好……待弦一郎大人回来便开始吧

entries.en: ... We will revive Ashina together with the Dragon's Blood.
entries.jp: …竜胤とともに、葦名を興すのだ

entries.en: Yes...
entries.jp: 承知…

entries.en: Conversation text: TBC
entries.jp: 会話テキスト：テキスト未定

entries.cn: 【未实装】佛师对话（讲述【主人公被拾来之经过，及佛师赠予义手忍具】）
entries.en: Onibotoke dialogue dummy text (the Sculptor saved the protagonist and gave him the Prosthetic Arm)
entries.jp: 仏師会話ダミー（「主人公を拾った経緯と、仏師が義手忍具を与えたこと」を話す）

entries.en: All purpose_Sculptor dialogue dummy (All-purpose dialogue)
entries.jp: 汎用_仏師会話ダミー（汎用会話）

entries.cn: 【未实装】佛师对话（递上素材道具，佛师便会做出义手忍具）
entries.en: Sculptor dialogue dummy (bring blueprints to the Sculptor, who will then make Arm Tools)
entries.jp: 仏師会話ダミー（素材アイテムを渡し、仏師が義手忍具を作ってくれる）

entries.cn: 【未实装】皇子对话（【主人公前去寻暗道，若寻得则以草笛为信】）
entries.en: Imperial Prince dialogue dummy (protagonist will find a hidden path and signal with a reed pipe)
entries.jp: 皇子会話ダミー（「主人公が抜け道を探しに行き、見つけたら草笛で合図する」という内容）

entries.cn: 【未实装】对话（搭话便会赠予皇子之铃）
entries.en: Dialogue dummy text (talk to receive the Imperial Prince's bell)
entries.jp: 会話ダミー（話すと、皇子の鈴を渡してくれる）

entries.cn: 【未实装】佛师对话（劝其与荒寺外之落武者进行战斗修习）
entries.en: Sculptor dialogue dummy (encourage combat training with the Fleeing Soldier outside the Dilapidated Temple)
entries.jp: 仏師会話ダミー（荒れ寺外の落ち武者で、戦闘の練習をするよう促す）

entries.en: Guhah hah! Look at it burn!
entries.jp: ぐはは、よく燃えるわ！

entries.cn:
我喜欢这玩意儿，这奇怪的筒
竟会喷火
entries.en:
This thing is great.
Fancy finding a fire-spewing pipe.
entries.jp:
気に入ったぞ、この妙な筒
火を吹きやがる

entries.cn: 所谓忍者，尽是携些古怪之物啊
entries.en: Those shinobi buggers carry the strangest things.
entries.jp: 忍びってのは、変わったものばかり持ってやがるな

entries.cn:
污浊野盗：瞧那位用心棒
那些忍者，被他轻易了结
entries.en:
Dingy Bandit: See that bodyguard?
He put one of those shinobi down like it was nothing.
entries.jp:
うす汚れた野盗：見ろよ、あの用心棒
忍びどもを、簡単にやっちまいやがった

entries.cn: 目光阴鸷之野盗：到底是八叶寺之忍者猎手，名不虚传
entries.en: Tired-eyed Bandit: Should hope so. He's a shinobi hunter from Hachiyouji.
entries.jp: ひねた目つきの野盗：さすがは、八葉寺の忍び狩りってところか

entries.cn:
污浊野盗：相传他收集所杀忍者之物品
倒是有几分雅趣
entries.en:
Dingy Bandit: Apparently he takes the belongings of those he kills.
A collector of sorts.
entries.jp:
うす汚れた野盗：殺した忍びの持ち物を、集めているらしいな
いい趣味してるぜ

entries.cn:
目光阴鸷之野盗：方才所杀之忍者
身上携有【忍火药】
entries.en: Tired-eyed Bandit: Seems that one from before was carrying some "shinobi gunpowder."
entries.jp:
ひねた目つきの野盗：さっき殺した忍びは、
“忍びの火薬”を持ってたとよ

entries.en: You're one of Owl's, right?
entries.jp: 梟殿のせがれか

entries.en: I appreciate the assistance.
entries.jp: 助太刀、礼を言うぞ

entries.en: The young master is in the inner sanctum.
entries.jp: 若様は本殿の奥のようだ

entries.en: You have to save him, no matter what.
entries.jp: なんとしても、お救いするぞ

entries.cn: 可恶，寺中之忍者去了何处
entries.en: Where did that Temple shinobi go?
entries.jp: おのれ、寺の忍びはどこだ

entries.cn:
于此附近寻找
白装束之乱波
entries.en:
He's around here somewhere.
A little scoundrel dressed in white.
entries.jp:
この辺りを探せ
白い装束の、らっぱ者だ

entries.en: Clamouring about something or other.
entries.jp: なにやら、大声で騒いでおったぞ

entries.en: That shinobi at the bottom of the well...
entries.jp: 井戸底におる、あの忍…

entries.cn: 没有上任何枷锁，没关系吗？
entries.en: We didn't shackle him, restrain him, nothing.  That doesn't worry anybody...?
entries.jp: 特に枷などしておりませんが、構わぬのでしょうか
entries.cn_improved: 没有上任何枷锁，没关系吗？

entries.cn: 没事。他既没有刀，连力气也没了
entries.en: Not at all.  Not only is he unarmed, he's completely lost his will to live.
entries.jp: 大事ない。刀もなく、気力すらない
entries.cn_improved: 没事。他既没有刀，连力气也没了

entries.cn: 那家伙已经，只是一个废物了……
entries.en: Nothing but a coward, unworthy of our concern.
entries.jp: 奴はもう、ただの腑抜けよ…
entries.cn_improved: 那家伙已经，只是一个废物了……

entries.en: ... Sounds like he's calmed down...
entries.jp: …どうやら、静まったようじゃな…

entries.en: Wha?!  The enemy is still alive!
entries.jp: ！　賊め、まだ生きておるぞ！

entries.cn: 什么！？火牛呢？火牛怎么样了！？
entries.en: What?!  What about the bull?! Where's the bull?!
entries.jp: なにっ！？　火牛は？火牛はどうしたっ！？
entries.cn_improved: 什么！？火牛呢？火牛怎么样了！？

entries.en: I'm sure you are all aware already.
entries.jp: みなの衆、分かっておるな

entries.cn: 马上将是苇名生死存亡之战！
entries.en: This coming battle will determine the fate of all Ashina.
entries.jp: きたるべきは、葦名存亡の戦
entries.cn_improved: 马上将是苇名生死存亡之战！

entries.cn:
为了一心大人，还有苇名的子民
舍命杀敌吧！
entries.en:
We go now to risk our lives for Lord Isshin
and the peoples of Ashina.
entries.jp:
一心様、そして葦名の民のために
命を捨てて参ろうぞ
entries.cn_improved:
为了一心大人，还有苇名的子民
舍命杀敌吧！

entries.cn: 我等便是苇名……不屈不挠的苇名众——！
entries.en: We are Ashina... we are unbreakable!
entries.jp: 我らこそ葦名…　不撓の葦名衆よ！
entries.cn_improved: 我等便是苇名……不屈不挠的苇名众——！

entries.en: Arrrghh!
entries.jp: おうっ！

entries.en: Arrrghh!
entries.jp: おうっ！

entries.en: Arrrrrrrghh!
entries.jp: おおうっ！

entries.en: For Ashina!
entries.jp: 葦名のため！

entries.en: For Ashina!
entries.jp: 葦名のため！

entries.en: For Ashina--!
entries.jp: 葦名のためにっ！

entries.cn: 这位阁下，你有没有看到个乱波啊？
entries.en: Hey, you didn't see a little scoundrel come running through here, did you?
entries.jp: お主、らっぱ者を見なかったか？
entries.cn_improved: 这位阁下，你有没有看到个乱波啊？

entries.en: We're after one, and I'm fairly sure he came this way...
entries.jp: このあたりに、逃げてきたはずなのじゃが…

entries.cn: 这个嘛……那家伙什么打扮？
entries.en: Hmm... what was he wearing?
entries.jp: ほーん…　そいつは、どんな格好だあ？
entries.cn_improved: 这个嘛……那家伙什么打扮？

entries.cn: 黑色的斗笠！是个戴着黑斗笠的小个子男人！
entries.en: He had a black hat on!  Short little guy!
entries.jp: 黒い笠じゃ！　黒笠の小男じゃ！
entries.cn_improved: 黑色的斗笠！是个戴着黑斗笠的小个子男人！

entries.cn: 嗯……不过，并没有人路过这一带啊
entries.en:
Hmm... thing is, nobody's passed this way at all.   
Only thing that did looked like some kind of animal... a raccoon?  Maybe a badger?  Couldn't say for sure.
entries.jp: ほーん…　だが、このあたりを通ったものは、おらぬがなあ
entries.cn_improved: 嗯……不过，并没有人路过这一带啊

entries.cn:
该不会是把狸猫……
或者貉看错了吧？
entries.en: You sure you didn’t mistake that animal for your criminal?
entries.jp:
タヌキか…　あるいはムジナか何かと
見間違えたんじゃあねえのかい？
entries.cn_improved:
该不会是把狸猫……
或者貉看错了吧？

entries.en: Oh come on... ugh.  Forget it!
entries.jp: くっ…　もうよいわっ！

entries.cn:
听说这一带混进了忍者
快去搜！
entries.en: Heard reports of a shinobi being seen somewhere around here.
entries.jp:
このあたりに、忍びが入り込んだそうじゃ
探してくれい
entries.cn_improved:
听说这一带混进了忍者
快去搜！

entries.cn: 明白了……不过最近很频繁啊
entries.en: I heard the same, but... lately it feels like an everyday occurrence.
entries.jp: 心得たが…　最近頻繁ではないか
entries.cn_improved: 明白了……不过最近很频繁啊

entries.cn: 是啊，也就是说战争临近了吧
entries.en: I know.  Goes to show just how soon the battle will be upon us.
entries.jp: ああ、それだけ、戦が近いということじゃろう
entries.cn_improved: 是啊，也就是说战争临近了吧

entries.cn: 正因如此，不能放任不管……
entries.en: Even more the reason to take these reports seriously...
entries.jp: だからこそ、放ってはおけぬでな…
entries.cn_improved: 正因如此，不能放任不管……

entries.en: ...Oh?  It's you...
entries.jp: ほう…貴様…

entries.en: The demon has made his appearance.
entries.jp: どうやら鬼のお出ましか

entries.en: That works out quite well. I will take my revenge for Masanari!
entries.jp: 丁度よい…　正就が仇、とらせてもらうぞ！

entries.en: ... Oh?  You're supposed to be dead...
entries.jp: …ほう、話が違うではないか

entries.en: Yet... you still live?
entries.jp: お主…　何故生きておる

entries.cn: ……算了。只要收拾掉，便合乎情理了
entries.en: ... It doesn't matter. I'll kill you now, and all will be as it's supposed to.
entries.jp: …まあいい　始末すれば、辻褄も合うというものよ
entries.cn_improved: ……算了。只要收拾掉，便合乎情理了

entries.en: Woahh! Look at it burn!
entries.jp: おお、よく燃えるのう！

entries.cn:
没错，吹火筒这名字叫得真不赖
用来提士气再合适不过了
entries.en:
Whoever called this a fire-breathing barrel wasn't kidding!
I can feel my spirits lifting already!
entries.jp:
ああ、火吹き筒とは、よく言ったものよ
景気づけにはぴったりだ
entries.cn_improved:
没错，吹火筒这名字叫得真不赖
用来提士气再合适不过了

entries.cn:
就是。这烦人的乡下屋子
至少最后来次爽的……
entries.en:
You ain't wrong. This estate always rubbed me the wrong way.
But you gotta give it a good send off at least...
entries.jp:
違えねえ。　辛気臭い田舎屋敷だ
せめて最期くらいは、ぱあっとねえ…
entries.cn_improved:
就是。这烦人的乡下屋子
至少最后来次爽的……

entries.en: (Groan...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐう…

entries.en: ... You're... the Son of... Owl....
entries.jp: …お主　梟の…せがれか…
おのれ、犬畜生めが…

entries.cn: 若手里剑未尽，定一一串穿之
entries.jp: 手裏剣さえ、尽きておらねば、串刺しにしてくれたものを

entries.en: What happened?
entries.jp: 何があった

entries.en: Thieves... at Hirata estate...
entries.jp: 賊…どもが…　平田屋敷に…

entries.en: You must, hurry... the Divine Heir...
entries.jp: 御子様を…　急ぐ、のじゃ…

entries.en: (Groan...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: ... What year is it?
entries.jp: …今は、幾年だ

entries.en: What year...? An odd question...
entries.jp: 何を…おかしな…

entries.en: Tell me.
entries.jp: 教えてくれ

entries.en: It's the...year of the Dragonspring pilgrimage...
entries.jp: 竜泉詣での、年であろ…う…

entries.en: (Groan...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: The Dragonspring pilgrimage...
entries.jp: （竜泉詣で…）

entries.en: That was three years ago...
entries.jp: （三年前…か）

entries.en: What is this...?
entries.jp: （どういうことだ…）

entries.en: (The Sculptor mentioned an "old memory".)
entries.jp: （仏師殿は古い記憶と言った）

entries.en: (I don't remember any of this...)
entries.jp: （何も、覚えてはおらぬが…）

entries.en: (but it appears this is the past...)
entries.jp: （これは、過去、ということか…）

entries.en: That was two years ago...
entries.jp: 二年前…か

entries.en: That was four years ago...
entries.jp: 四年前…か

entries.en: That was five years ago...
entries.jp: 五年前…か

entries.en: Those... worthless bastards...
entries.jp: おの、れ…　下郎ども…

entries.en: Hello?
entries.jp: おい

entries.en: ...You are... shinobi if... if I'm not mistaken...
entries.jp: …お主…確か…　忍び、よな…

entries.en: Take the shinobi axe from... from the temple...
entries.jp: であれば…　お堂の、忍び斧を…

entries.en: And... split... their skulls wide open...
entries.jp: やつらを…　頭蓋を…叩き割って…

entries.en: Please...
entries.jp: 頼…む…

entries.cn: 把他们……连盾牌一起敲碎……杀掉……
entries.en: Grind their corpses into the dirt... shields and all...
entries.jp: やつらを…　盾ごと砕き…殺して…
entries.cn_improved: 把他们……连盾牌一起敲碎……杀掉……

entries.en: ... You... You're the young master's shinobi...
entries.jp: …お主…　若様の、忍びじゃな

entries.en: Yes.
entries.jp: ああ

entries.cn: ……关键时刻人不在，真是没用的东西
entries.en: ... What good are you?  You were nowhere to be seen when things went south...
entries.jp: …肝心なときにおらぬ、とんだ役立たずめ
entries.cn_improved: ……关键时刻人不在，真是没用的东西

entries.en: ... Wait...
entries.jp: …いや、もしや…

entries.en: Tell me you didn't lead them here yourself.
entries.jp: お主、賊を手引いたのではあるまいな？

entries.cn:
不然的话，这平田庄
怎会如此轻易地被攻陷……
entries.en: The timing of their attack was perfect... normally those bandits wouldn't have stood a chance.
entries.jp:
さもなくば、この平田屋敷が
こうも呆気なく落ちようものか…
entries.cn_improved:
不然的话，这平田庄
怎会如此轻易地被攻陷……

entries.en: Yes... yes, it had to be you...
entries.jp: そうよ…　そうに違いないわ…

entries.en: I hope you die, traitor!
entries.jp: 去ねい！　裏切り者は、去ねい！

entries.en: (Groan...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐう…

entries.cn: 坠落谷的铁炮要塞……比传说还要厉害……
entries.en: The gun fort ... Was even more formidable than we'd heard...
entries.jp: 落ち谷の、鉄砲砦…　噂以上よ…
entries.cn_improved: 坠落谷的铁炮要塞……比传说还要厉害……

entries.cn: 没有准备……实在太鲁莽了……
entries.en: We were reckless... to go in unprepared...
entries.jp: 備えなきは…　無謀であったわ…
entries.cn_improved: 没有准备……实在太鲁莽了……

entries.cn: 好怀念……能听见仙峯寺的钟声……
entries.en: Ahh, it takes me back... I can hear... the Senpou temple bell... Ughh...
entries.jp: 懐かしい…　仙峯寺の鐘が、聞こえらあ…
entries.cn_improved: 好怀念……能听见仙峯寺的钟声……

entries.en: (Grunt... Groan...)
entries.jp: む…　ぐ…

entries.en: ... Who... or what.. did this to you?
entries.jp: …何にやられた

entries.en: Large... ape...
entries.jp: 大…猿…

entries.en: My neck... my neck...
entries.jp: 首が…　首が…

entries.en: (Groans)
entries.jp: うっ…

entries.en: Hey... hey you... (Cough, cough...)
entries.jp: …おお、お主　ごほっ、ごほっ…

entries.cn:
若你是知晓佛道之人……
能帮我讨伐佛敌吗？
entries.en:
If you know the path of Buddha...
Would you slay one who opposes it?
entries.jp:
もし、御仏の道を知るものならば…
仏敵を討ってはくれまいか
entries.cn_improved:
若你是知晓佛道之人……
能帮我讨伐佛敌吗？

entries.en: One who opposes the Buddha?
entries.jp: 仏敵だと？

entries.cn:
没错……咳咳、咳咳……
那家伙盘踞在这前面的荒废寺院……
entries.en:
Correct... (Cough, cough...)
The one of whom I speak hides in an abandoned temple up ahead...
entries.jp:
そうじゃ…　ごほっ、ごほっ…
あれは、この先の廃寺に籠り…
entries.cn_improved:
没错……咳咳、咳咳……
那家伙盘踞在这前面的荒废寺院……

entries.cn: 为欺骗村民们……用幻觉之雾把村子封闭了
entries.en: He's sealed away the village in a shadowy fog... so that he can fool the villagers.
entries.jp: 村人たちをまやかすため…　幻の霧で、村を閉ざしておるのじゃ
entries.cn_improved: 为欺骗村民们……用幻觉之雾把村子封闭了

entries.en: An abandoned temple...?
entries.jp: 廃寺か…

entries.cn: 对，是座旧建筑……咳咳、咳咳……
entries.en: Yes, it's an old building... (Cough, cough...)
entries.jp: ああ、古い建物でな…　ごほっ、ごほっ…
entries.cn_improved: 对，是座旧建筑……咳咳、咳咳……

entries.cn: 若正门是关着的，二楼应该还开有一个洞
entries.en: The door may be closed, but there should be a hole in the second floor.
entries.jp: もし扉が閉ざされていても、二階に穴が、開いているはずじゃ
entries.cn_improved: 若正门是关着的，二楼应该还开有一个洞

entries.en: ... Come, will you slay he who opposes Buddha?
entries.jp: …のう、お主、仏敵を討ってくれまいか

entries.en: (Cough, cough...)
entries.jp: ごほっ、ごほっ…

entries.cn: 那家伙盘踞的荒废寺院，是座破旧的建筑……
entries.en: The abandoned temple he hides in is an old building...
entries.jp: あれの籠る廃寺は、古い建物でな…
entries.cn_improved: 那家伙盘踞的荒废寺院，是座破旧的建筑……

entries.cn: 若正门是关着的，二楼应该还开有一个洞
entries.en: The door may be closed, but there should be a hole in the second floor.
entries.jp: もし扉が閉ざされていても、二階に穴が、開いているはずじゃ
entries.cn_improved: 若正门是关着的，二楼应该还开有一个洞

entries.en: I've gotten terribly old, but...
entries.jp: 私も、ひどく老いてしもうたが…

entries.cn: 但还是想，能再一次让佛祖大人回到寺院……
entries.en: This old man would like to see Lord Buddha return to his temple once more...
entries.jp: もう一度、仏様を、寺に戻して差し上げたいのじゃ…
entries.cn_improved: 但还是想，能再一次让佛祖大人回到寺院……

entries.en: (Groan... Moan...)
entries.jp: う…　うう…

entries.en: The shinobi... they're...
entries.jp: 忍び…　どもが…

entries.en: In the moat...
entries.jp: お堀…

entries.en: (Groans and chokes...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: In-... truders...
entries.jp: しん…　にゅうしゃ…

entries.en: (Groan... Moan...)
entries.jp: う…　うう…

entries.en: The shinobi... they're...
entries.jp: 忍び…　どもが…

entries.en: In the moat...
entries.jp: お堀…
ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: In-... truders...
entries.jp: しん…　にゅうしゃ…

entries.en: ...it's you...
entries.jp: …お主か…

entries.cn: 御子殿下和爱麻小姐……被盯上了……
entries.en: The Divine Heir and Lady Emma... they're being targeted...
entries.jp: 御子様と、エマ殿が…　狙われておる…
entries.cn_improved: 御子殿下和爱麻小姐……被盯上了……

entries.en: Could I ask you... to protect them...?
entries.jp: お二人を…　頼めるか…？

entries.en: I will.
entries.jp: 分かった

entries.en: To think I'd have to ask for your help...
entries.jp: フッ　…お主に、頼みごととは…

entries.en: It's truly... maddening...
entries.jp: まったく…　癪…じゃあ…

entries.en: (Groan... Moan...)
entries.jp: う…　うう…

entries.cn: 这前面……是内府方面的大本营……
entries.en: Up ahead... The Interior Ministry’s stronghold...
entries.jp: この先…　内府方の、本陣が…
entries.cn_improved: 这前面……是内府方面的大本营……

entries.en: Bring them down and...there’s still...
entries.jp: あれを、落とせば…　まだ…

entries.en: Ashina w-will...
entries.jp: あ、葦名は…

entries.en: (Groans...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: ... Ahh...  Everything was burning...
entries.jp: …ああ、全部、燃えちまった…

entries.en: ... The fires raging out of control...
entries.jp: …炎が、暴れ狂って…

entries.en: ... The howling was intense...
entries.jp: …ひどく哭いてやがるんだ…

entries.en: (Groan...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐう…

entries.en: ... You... you're a shinobi, right...?
entries.jp: …そなた…　忍びよな…

entries.en: Please, reinforce the men in the Castle Outskirts...
entries.jp: ならば、城下に、向かってくれぬか…

entries.cn: 那里现在……正值生死关头……
entries.en: They're on the verge... of defeat...
entries.jp: 今はあそこが…　瀬戸際なのじゃ…
entries.cn_improved: 那里现在……正值生死关头……

entries.en: ...You're a shinobi... of Ashina, are you not...?
entries.jp: …そなた…　葦名の、忍びよな…

entries.en: ... You're... the shinobi of the Divine Heir, are you not...?
entries.jp: …そなた…　御子様の、忍びよな…

entries.en: I will.
entries.jp: わかった

entries.en: You have... my gratitude...
entries.jp: か、かたじけない…

entries.cn: 从那边的土墙，顺着屋顶过去的话……
entries.en: Climb that mud wall to get to the roof...
entries.jp: そこの土塀から、屋根伝いにゆけば…
entries.cn_improved: 从那边的土墙，顺着屋顶过去的话……

entries.cn: 应该有忍者风筝升起来……
entries.en: There should be a shinobi kite there...
entries.jp: 忍び凧が、あがっているはずじゃ…
entries.cn_improved: 应该有忍者风筝升起来……

entries.en: Forget about me...
entries.jp: 儂は、もうよい…

entries.cn: 拜托你……去支援城下的各位……
entries.en: Help our men in the Castle Outskirts... please...
entries.jp: 城下の、みなの加勢を…　頼む…
entries.cn_improved: 拜托你……去支援城下的各位……

entries.en: For... Ashina...
entries.jp: 葦名の…　ため…

entries.en: (Groans and chokes...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.en: You can...
entries.jp: のう、そなた…

entries.cn: 从那边的土墙，顺着屋顶过去的话……
entries.en: Climb on that mud wall to get to the roof...
entries.jp: そこの土塀から、屋根伝いにゆけば…
entries.cn_improved: 从那边的土墙，顺着屋顶过去的话……

entries.cn: 应该有忍者风筝升起来……
entries.en: There should be a shinobi kite flying there...
entries.jp: 忍び凧が、あがっているはずじゃ…
entries.cn_improved: 应该有忍者风筝升起来……

entries.en: Forget about me...
entries.jp: 儂は、もうよい…

entries.cn: 拜托你……去支援城下的各位……
entries.en: Help those in the Castle Outskirts...
entries.jp: 城下の、みなの加勢を…　頼む…
entries.cn_improved: 拜托你……去支援城下的各位……

entries.en: For... Ashina...
entries.jp: 葦名の…　ため…

entries.en: (Groans and chokes...)
entries.jp: ぐ、ぐうっ…

entries.cn: 从那上面，顺着屋顶过去的话……
entries.en: Climb up there to reach the roof...
entries.jp: そこの上から、屋根伝いにゆけば…
entries.cn_improved: 从那上面，顺着屋顶过去的话……

entries.en: You're... part of the reinforcement force, right...?
entries.jp: …お主…　城下の、加勢よな…

entries.en: Please... please hurry...
entries.jp: なれば…　急いでくれ…

entries.en: The castle outskirts... are in bad shape...
entries.jp: 城下は…　ひどい…有様じゃ

entries.cn: 该死的内府……连蛇谷都架起了桥……
entries.en: The damned ministry forces... They've taken up to serpent valley and raised a bridge...
entries.jp: 内府方め…　蛇谷に、橋までかけおって…
entries.cn_improved: 该死的内府……连蛇谷都架起了桥……

entries.en: Please... save Ashina...
entries.jp: 頼む…　葦名を…

entries.en: For... Ashina...
entries.jp: 葦名の…ため…

entries.en: Cross the bridge... reach the outskirts...
entries.jp: 橋を渡って…　城下に…

entries.en: Nanomachines, son.
YOU SHOULD KILL YOURSELF... NOW!
